---
title: "Match Run Analysis"
output: html_document
date: "2026-05-20"
---

```{r setup, include=FALSE}
knitr::opts_chunk$set(echo = TRUE)


library(tidyverse)
library(lubridate)
library(survival)
library(coxme)
library(tidycmprsk)
library(cmprsk)
library(ggsurvfit)
library(patchwork)
library(broom)
library(data.table)
library(purrr)
library(timeROC)

```


``` {r load datasets}

thoracic_wlhistory_data = read_sas("~/Desktop/R Project Data/HRStatJust2509DanielAhn/thoracic_wlhistory_data", NULL)

thoracic_data = read_sas("~/Desktop/R Project Data/HRStatJust2509DanielAhn/thoracic_data", NULL)

thoracic_stat1a = read_sas("~/Desktop/R Project Data/HRStatJust2509DanielAhn/thoracic_stat1a", NULL)

thoracic_stat1b = read_sas("~/Desktop/R Project Data/HRStatJust2509DanielAhn/thoracic_stat1b", NULL)

thoracic_mcs_device = read_sas("~/Desktop/R Project Data/HRStatJust2509DanielAhn/thoracic_mcs_device", NULL)

ptr_hrhl = read_sas("~/Desktop/R Project Data/HRStatJust2509DanielAhn/ptr_hrhl", NULL)


```

``` {r time-dependent auc analysis}


# ── Step 1: Snapshot dates ────────────────────────────────────────
snap_dates_auc <- seq.Date(
  as.Date("2016-04-01"),
  as.Date("2024-10-01"),
  by = "3 months"
)

cat("Number of snapshots:", length(snap_dates_auc), "\n")


# ── Step 2: Status history — Status 1A only ───────────────────────
status_hx_auc <- ped_hx_snap %>%
  filter(
    WL_ID_CODE %in% analytic_era_2025$WL_ID_CODE,
    UNOS_CAND_STAT_CD == 2010
  ) %>%
  mutate(
    CHG_DATE     = as.Date(CHG_DATE),
    CHG_END_DATE = as.Date(CHG_END_DATE)
  ) %>%
  dplyr::select(
    WL_ID_CODE,
    CHG_DATE,
    CHG_END_DATE
  )


# ── Step 3: ECMO data ─────────────────────────────────────────────
ecmo_snap <- thoracic_mcs_device %>%
  filter(
    WL_ID_CODE %in% analytic_era_2025$WL_ID_CODE,
    DEVICE_TYPE %in% c("ECMO", "VA ECMO", "VV ECMO")
  ) %>%
  mutate(
    IMPLANT_DATE = as.Date(IMPLANT_DATE),
    EXPLANT_DATE = as.Date(EXPLANT_DATE)
  ) %>%
  dplyr::select(
    WL_ID_CODE,
    IMPLANT_DATE,
    EXPLANT_DATE
  )


# ── Step 4: Ventilation data ──────────────────────────────────────
vent_snap <- thoracic_stat1a %>%
  filter(
    WL_ID_CODE %in% analytic_era_2025$WL_ID_CODE,
    !is.na(REQ1_CONTINUOUS_VENTILATION)
  ) %>%
  mutate(
    UPGRADE_EXTDATE = as.Date(UPGRADE_EXTDATE)
  ) %>%
  dplyr::select(
    WL_ID_CODE,
    UPGRADE_EXTDATE,
    REQ1_CONTINUOUS_VENTILATION
  ) %>%
  arrange(
    WL_ID_CODE,
    UPGRADE_EXTDATE
  )


# ── Step 4b: Reconstruct ventilation episodes ────────────────────
vent_episodes <- vent_snap %>%
  group_by(WL_ID_CODE) %>%
  arrange(
    UPGRADE_EXTDATE,
    .by_group = TRUE
  ) %>%
  mutate(
    vent_on       = as.integer(REQ1_CONTINUOUS_VENTILATION == 1),
    prev_vent     = lag(vent_on, default = 0L),
    episode_start = vent_on == 1 & prev_vent == 0,
    episode_id    = cumsum(episode_start) * vent_on
  ) %>%
  filter(vent_on == 1) %>%
  group_by(
    WL_ID_CODE,
    episode_id
  ) %>%
  summarise(
    vent_start = min(UPGRADE_EXTDATE),
    .groups = "drop"
  ) %>%
  left_join(
    vent_snap %>%
      filter(REQ1_CONTINUOUS_VENTILATION != 1) %>%
      dplyr::select(
        WL_ID_CODE,
        vent_off_date = UPGRADE_EXTDATE
      ),
    by = "WL_ID_CODE",
    relationship = "many-to-many"
  ) %>%
  filter(
    is.na(vent_off_date) |
      vent_off_date > vent_start
  ) %>%
  group_by(
    WL_ID_CODE,
    episode_id,
    vent_start
  ) %>%
  summarise(
    vent_end = if (
      all(is.na(vent_off_date))
    ) {
      as.Date(NA)
    } else {
      min(vent_off_date, na.rm = TRUE)
    },
    .groups = "drop"
  ) %>%
  dplyr::select(
    WL_ID_CODE,
    vent_start,
    vent_end
  )


# ── Step 5: Outcomes ──────────────────────────────────────────────
outcomes_auc <- analytic_era_2025 %>%
  dplyr::select(
    WL_ID_CODE,
    END_DATE,
    death
  ) %>%
  mutate(
    END_DATE = as.Date(END_DATE)
  )


# ── Step 6: Interval union helper ─────────────────────────────────
union_days <- function(starts, ends) {
  
  if (length(starts) == 0) {
    return(0)
  }
  
  ord <- order(starts)
  
  starts <- starts[ord]
  ends   <- ends[ord]
  
  total     <- 0
  cur_start <- starts[1]
  cur_end   <- ends[1]
  
  if (length(starts) > 1) {
    
    for (i in 2:length(starts)) {
      
      if (starts[i] <= cur_end) {
        
        cur_end <- max(
          cur_end,
          ends[i]
        )
        
      } else {
        
        total <- total +
          as.numeric(cur_end - cur_start)
        
        cur_start <- starts[i]
        cur_end   <- ends[i]
      }
    }
  }
  
  total <- total +
    as.numeric(cur_end - cur_start)
  
  total
}


# ── Step 7: Analysis horizon ──────────────────────────────────────
auc_horizon <- 90

# timeROC requires some controls to have follow-up strictly greater
# than the evaluation time. Candidates known to be event-free through
# day 90 are therefore assigned administrative follow-up just beyond
# day 90.
admin_time <- auc_horizon + 0.01


# ── Step 8: Build snapshot dataset ────────────────────────────────
cat("Building AUC snapshot dataset (Status 1A only)...\n")

auc_snap_data <- lapply(
  snap_dates_auc,
  function(dt) {
    
    # ── Active Status 1A candidates ───────────────────────────────
    active_1a <- status_hx_auc %>%
      filter(
        CHG_DATE <= dt,
        is.na(CHG_END_DATE) |
          CHG_END_DATE > dt
      ) %>%
      distinct(WL_ID_CODE)
    
    if (nrow(active_1a) < 10) {
      return(NULL)
    }
    
    
    # ── Total cumulative active Status 1A waiting time ────────────
    wt_at_snap <- status_hx_auc %>%
      filter(
        WL_ID_CODE %in% active_1a$WL_ID_CODE,
        CHG_DATE <= dt
      ) %>%
      mutate(
        period_end = if_else(
          is.na(CHG_END_DATE) |
            CHG_END_DATE > dt,
          dt,
          CHG_END_DATE
        ),
        days_counted = as.numeric(
          period_end - CHG_DATE
        )
      ) %>%
      filter(days_counted > 0) %>%
      group_by(WL_ID_CODE) %>%
      summarise(
        wait_days = sum(
          days_counted,
          na.rm = TRUE
        ),
        .groups = "drop"
      )
    
    
    # ── Status 1A intervals clipped to snapshot ───────────────────
    status1a_intervals <- status_hx_auc %>%
      filter(
        WL_ID_CODE %in% active_1a$WL_ID_CODE,
        CHG_DATE <= dt
      ) %>%
      transmute(
        WL_ID_CODE,
        status_start = CHG_DATE,
        status_end = if_else(
          is.na(CHG_END_DATE) |
            CHG_END_DATE > dt,
          dt,
          CHG_END_DATE
        )
      ) %>%
      filter(status_end > status_start)
    
    
    # ── ECMO intervals and current ECMO flag ──────────────────────
    ecmo_at_snap <- ecmo_snap %>%
      filter(
        WL_ID_CODE %in% active_1a$WL_ID_CODE,
        IMPLANT_DATE <= dt
      ) %>%
      mutate(
        eff_end = if_else(
          is.na(EXPLANT_DATE) |
            EXPLANT_DATE > dt,
          dt,
          EXPLANT_DATE
        ),
        still_on = (
          is.na(EXPLANT_DATE) |
            EXPLANT_DATE > dt
        )
      )
    
    ecmo_flag <- ecmo_at_snap %>%
      group_by(WL_ID_CODE) %>%
      summarise(
        on_ecmo = as.integer(
          any(still_on)
        ),
        .groups = "drop"
      )
    
    ecmo_intervals <- ecmo_at_snap %>%
      transmute(
        WL_ID_CODE,
        start = IMPLANT_DATE,
        end   = eff_end
      ) %>%
      filter(end > start)
    
    
    # ── Current ventilation flag ──────────────────────────────────
    vent_at_snap <- vent_snap %>%
      filter(
        WL_ID_CODE %in% active_1a$WL_ID_CODE,
        UPGRADE_EXTDATE <= dt
      ) %>%
      group_by(WL_ID_CODE) %>%
      slice_max(
        UPGRADE_EXTDATE,
        n = 1,
        with_ties = FALSE
      ) %>%
      ungroup() %>%
      mutate(
        on_vent = as.integer(
          REQ1_CONTINUOUS_VENTILATION == 1
        )
      ) %>%
      dplyr::select(
        WL_ID_CODE,
        on_vent
      )
    
    
    # ── Historical ventilation intervals clipped to snapshot ─────
    vent_intervals <- vent_episodes %>%
      filter(
        WL_ID_CODE %in% active_1a$WL_ID_CODE,
        vent_start <= dt
      ) %>%
      transmute(
        WL_ID_CODE,
        start = vent_start,
        end = if_else(
          is.na(vent_end) |
            vent_end > dt,
          dt,
          vent_end
        )
      ) %>%
      filter(end > start)
    
    
    # ── ECMO or ventilation intervals ─────────────────────────────
    support_intervals <- bind_rows(
      ecmo_intervals,
      vent_intervals
    ) %>%
      filter(end > start)
    
    
    # ── New Status 1 intervals ────────────────────────────────────
    # New Status 1 requires simultaneous:
    # Status 1A AND (ECMO OR mechanical ventilation).
    ns1_intervals <- support_intervals %>%
      inner_join(
        status1a_intervals,
        by = "WL_ID_CODE",
        relationship = "many-to-many"
      ) %>%
      filter(
        start < status_end,
        status_start < end
      ) %>%
      transmute(
        WL_ID_CODE,
        start = pmax(
          start,
          status_start
        ),
        end = pmin(
          end,
          status_end
        )
      ) %>%
      filter(end > start)
    
    
    # ── Total nonoverlapping New Status 1 waiting time ─────────────
    ns1_union <- ns1_intervals %>%
      group_by(WL_ID_CODE) %>%
      summarise(
        ns1_days = union_days(
          start,
          end
        ),
        .groups = "drop"
      )
    
    
    # ── Combine snapshot data ─────────────────────────────────────
    snap_df <- active_1a %>%
      left_join(
        wt_at_snap,
        by = "WL_ID_CODE"
      ) %>%
      left_join(
        ecmo_flag,
        by = "WL_ID_CODE"
      ) %>%
      left_join(
        vent_at_snap,
        by = "WL_ID_CODE"
      ) %>%
      left_join(
        ns1_union,
        by = "WL_ID_CODE"
      ) %>%
      mutate(
        on_ecmo   = replace_na(on_ecmo, 0L),
        on_vent   = replace_na(on_vent, 0L),
        wait_days = replace_na(wait_days, 0),
        ns1_days  = replace_na(ns1_days, 0),
        
        new_status1 = as.integer(
          on_ecmo == 1 |
            on_vent == 1
        ),
        
        ns2_days = pmax(
          wait_days - ns1_days,
          0
        ),
        
        wait_days_tier = if_else(
          new_status1 == 1,
          ns1_days,
          ns2_days
        )
      )
    
    
    # ── Current-system rank ───────────────────────────────────────
    snap_df <- snap_df %>%
      arrange(
        desc(wait_days),
        WL_ID_CODE
      ) %>%
      mutate(
        rank_current = row_number()
      )
    
    
    # ── Counterfactual rank ───────────────────────────────────────
    snap_df <- snap_df %>%
      arrange(
        desc(new_status1),
        desc(wait_days_tier),
        WL_ID_CODE
      ) %>%
      mutate(
        rank_cf = row_number()
      )
    
    
    # ── Outcomes after each snapshot ──────────────────────────────
    snap_df <- snap_df %>%
      left_join(
        outcomes_auc,
        by = "WL_ID_CODE"
      ) %>%
      mutate(
        time_to_removal = as.numeric(
          END_DATE - dt
        ),
        
        observed_time = case_when(
          is.na(time_to_removal) ~ NA_real_,
          time_to_removal < 0   ~ NA_real_,
          time_to_removal == 0  ~ 0.5,
          TRUE                  ~ time_to_removal
        ),
        
        # Death or removal for deterioration through day 90.
        event_90 = as.integer(
          death == 1 &
            !is.na(observed_time) &
            observed_time <= auc_horizon
        ),
        
        # Event through day 90:
        # retain the actual event time.
        #
        # Transplant or other censoring before day 90:
        # retain the actual censoring time.
        #
        # Event-free through day 90:
        # assign follow-up just beyond day 90 so timeROC can identify
        # controls at t = 90.
        time_days_90 = case_when(
          event_90 == 1 ~ observed_time,
          
          !is.na(observed_time) &
            observed_time <= auc_horizon ~ observed_time,
          
          TRUE ~ admin_time
        ),
        
        snapshot_date = dt
      ) %>%
      filter(
        !is.na(time_days_90)
      )
    
    snap_df
  }
) %>%
  bind_rows()


# ── Step 9: Snapshot summary ──────────────────────────────────────
cat("\nSnapshot dataset summary:\n")

cat(
  "Total rows:",
  nrow(auc_snap_data),
  "\n"
)

cat(
  "Total events:",
  sum(auc_snap_data$event_90),
  "\n"
)

cat(
  "Unique candidates:",
  n_distinct(auc_snap_data$WL_ID_CODE),
  "\n"
)

cat(
  "Snapshots with data:",
  n_distinct(auc_snap_data$snapshot_date),
  "\n"
)

cat(
  "Event rate:",
  round(
    mean(auc_snap_data$event_90) * 100,
    1
  ),
  "%\n"
)

cat(
  "\nNew Status 1 rows:",
  sum(auc_snap_data$new_status1),
  sprintf(
    "(%.1f%%)\n",
    mean(auc_snap_data$new_status1) * 100
  )
)

cat("\nTier-specific waiting time summary:\n")

auc_snap_data %>%
  group_by(new_status1) %>%
  summarise(
    n         = n(),
    median_wt = median(wait_days_tier),
    mean_wt   = round(
      mean(wait_days_tier),
      1
    ),
    .groups = "drop"
  ) %>%
  print()


# ── Step 10: Verify 90-day risk-set construction ──────────────────
cat(
  "\nEvents by 90 days:",
  sum(auc_snap_data$event_90 == 1),
  "\n"
)

cat(
  "Controls observed beyond 90 days:",
  sum(
    auc_snap_data$event_90 == 0 &
      auc_snap_data$time_days_90 > auc_horizon
  ),
  "\n"
)

cat(
  "Censored before or at 90 days:",
  sum(
    auc_snap_data$event_90 == 0 &
      auc_snap_data$time_days_90 <= auc_horizon
  ),
  "\n"
)


# ── Step 11: Time-dependent AUC at exactly 90 days ────────────────
cat("\nComputing time-dependent AUC...\n")

auc_current <- timeROC(
  T         = auc_snap_data$time_days_90,
  delta     = auc_snap_data$event_90,
  marker    = -auc_snap_data$rank_current,
  cause     = 1,
  weighting = "marginal",
  times     = auc_horizon,
  iid       = TRUE
)

auc_cf <- timeROC(
  T         = auc_snap_data$time_days_90,
  delta     = auc_snap_data$event_90,
  marker    = -auc_snap_data$rank_cf,
  cause     = 1,
  weighting = "marginal",
  times     = auc_horizon,
  iid       = TRUE
)


auc_index_current <- which(
  auc_current$times == auc_horizon
)

auc_index_cf <- which(
  auc_cf$times == auc_horizon
)

if (
  length(auc_index_current) != 1 ||
  length(auc_index_cf) != 1
) {
  stop(
    "Could not uniquely identify the requested 90-day AUC."
  )
}


auc_current_90 <- auc_current$AUC[
  auc_index_current
]

auc_cf_90 <- auc_cf$AUC[
  auc_index_cf
]


cat("\n=== TIME-DEPENDENT AUC AT 90 DAYS ===\n")

cat(
  "Current System AUC:          ",
  round(auc_current_90, 3),
  "\n"
)

cat(
  "4-Status Counterfactual AUC: ",
  round(auc_cf_90, 3),
  "\n"
)

cat(
  "AUC difference (CF - Current):",
  round(
    auc_cf_90 - auc_current_90,
    3
  ),
  "\n"
)


# ── Step 12: Candidate-clustered bootstrap ────────────────────────
set.seed(42)

n_boot     <- 1000
unique_ids <- unique(
  auc_snap_data$WL_ID_CODE
)

cat(
  "Unique candidates to resample:",
  length(unique_ids),
  "\n"
)

cat(
  "Running clustered bootstrap (n =",
  n_boot,
  ")...\n"
)


auc_dt <- as.data.table(
  auc_snap_data
)

setkey(
  auc_dt,
  WL_ID_CODE
)


boot_results <- vector(
  "list",
  n_boot
)

boot_errors <- character(
  n_boot
)

pb <- txtProgressBar(
  min = 0,
  max = n_boot,
  style = 3
)


for (i in seq_len(n_boot)) {
  
  tryCatch({
    
    boot_ids <- sample(
      unique_ids,
      length(unique_ids),
      replace = TRUE
    )
    
    id_dt <- data.table(
      WL_ID_CODE = boot_ids,
      boot_row = seq_along(boot_ids)
    )
    
    boot_dat <- auc_dt[
      id_dt,
      on = "WL_ID_CODE",
      allow.cartesian = TRUE
    ]
    
    if (sum(boot_dat$event_90) < 5) {
      boot_errors[i] <- "Fewer than 5 events"
      next
    }
    
    
    roc_curr <- timeROC(
      T         = boot_dat$time_days_90,
      delta     = boot_dat$event_90,
      marker    = -boot_dat$rank_current,
      cause     = 1,
      weighting = "marginal",
      times     = auc_horizon,
      iid       = FALSE
    )
    
    roc_cf <- timeROC(
      T         = boot_dat$time_days_90,
      delta     = boot_dat$event_90,
      marker    = -boot_dat$rank_cf,
      cause     = 1,
      weighting = "marginal",
      times     = auc_horizon,
      iid       = FALSE
    )
    
    
    curr_idx <- which(
      roc_curr$times == auc_horizon
    )
    
    cf_idx <- which(
      roc_cf$times == auc_horizon
    )
    
    if (
      length(curr_idx) != 1 ||
      length(cf_idx) != 1
    ) {
      stop(
        "Could not uniquely identify the requested bootstrap AUC."
      )
    }
    
    
    boot_results[[i]] <- tibble(
      auc_current = roc_curr$AUC[curr_idx],
      auc_cf      = roc_cf$AUC[cf_idx],
      auc_diff    = roc_cf$AUC[cf_idx] -
        roc_curr$AUC[curr_idx]
    )
    
  }, error = function(e) {
    
    boot_errors[i] <<- conditionMessage(e)
    
  })
  
  setTxtProgressBar(
    pb,
    i
  )
}


close(pb)


boot_clean <- bind_rows(
  boot_results
)

cat(
  "\nSuccessful iterations:",
  nrow(boot_clean),
  "/",
  n_boot,
  "\n"
)


if (nrow(boot_clean) < 0.95 * n_boot) {
  
  warning(
    paste0(
      "Fewer than 95% of bootstrap iterations succeeded: ",
      nrow(boot_clean),
      " of ",
      n_boot,
      "."
    )
  )
}


if (any(nzchar(boot_errors))) {
  
  cat("\nBootstrap failure reasons:\n")
  
  print(
    sort(
      table(
        boot_errors[nzchar(boot_errors)]
      ),
      decreasing = TRUE
    )
  )
}


# ── Step 13: Bootstrap results ────────────────────────────────────
cat("\n=== BOOTSTRAP RESULTS ===\n")


cat("\nCurrent System AUC:\n")

cat(
  "  Point estimate:",
  round(auc_current_90, 3),
  "\n"
)

cat(
  "  Bootstrap mean:",
  round(
    mean(
      boot_clean$auc_current,
      na.rm = TRUE
    ),
    3
  ),
  "\n"
)

cat(
  "  95% CI:        ",
  round(
    quantile(
      boot_clean$auc_current,
      0.025,
      na.rm = TRUE
    ),
    3
  ),
  "-",
  round(
    quantile(
      boot_clean$auc_current,
      0.975,
      na.rm = TRUE
    ),
    3
  ),
  "\n"
)


cat("\n4-Status Counterfactual AUC:\n")

cat(
  "  Point estimate:",
  round(auc_cf_90, 3),
  "\n"
)

cat(
  "  Bootstrap mean:",
  round(
    mean(
      boot_clean$auc_cf,
      na.rm = TRUE
    ),
    3
  ),
  "\n"
)

cat(
  "  95% CI:        ",
  round(
    quantile(
      boot_clean$auc_cf,
      0.025,
      na.rm = TRUE
    ),
    3
  ),
  "-",
  round(
    quantile(
      boot_clean$auc_cf,
      0.975,
      na.rm = TRUE
    ),
    3
  ),
  "\n"
)


cat("\nAUC difference (CF - Current):\n")

cat(
  "  Point estimate:",
  round(
    auc_cf_90 - auc_current_90,
    3
  ),
  "\n"
)

cat(
  "  Bootstrap mean:",
  round(
    mean(
      boot_clean$auc_diff,
      na.rm = TRUE
    ),
    3
  ),
  "\n"
)

cat(
  "  95% CI:        ",
  round(
    quantile(
      boot_clean$auc_diff,
      0.025,
      na.rm = TRUE
    ),
    3
  ),
  "-",
  round(
    quantile(
      boot_clean$auc_diff,
      0.975,
      na.rm = TRUE
    ),
    3
  ),
  "\n"
)

cat(
  "  p-value (H0: diff = 0):",
  round(
    mean(
      boot_clean$auc_diff <= 0,
      na.rm = TRUE
    ),
    4
  ),
  "\n"
)

```




``` {r match run analysis setup}
cat("Columns in thoracic_stat1a:\n")
colnames(thoracic_stat1a) %>% print()

cat("\nREQ1_CONTINUOUS_VENTILATION distribution:\n")
thoracic_stat1a %>%
  count(REQ1_CONTINUOUS_VENTILATION) %>%
  print()

cat("\nDate field:\n")
thoracic_stat1a %>%
  dplyr::select(
    WL_ID_CODE,
    UPGRADE_EXTDATE,
    REQ1_CONTINUOUS_VENTILATION
  ) %>%
  head(5) %>%
  print()


# ── Full pediatric candidate pool ─────────────────────────────────
all_ped_ids <- thoracic_data %>%
  filter(
    WL_ORG == "HR",
    INIT_AGE < 18,
    as.Date(INIT_DATE) <= as.Date("2024-12-31")
  ) %>%
  distinct(WL_ID_CODE)


# ── Overlap with PTR pediatric candidates ────────────────────────
ptr_ped_ids <- ptr_hrhl %>%
  filter(
    WL_ID_CODE %in% all_ped_ids$WL_ID_CODE
  ) %>%
  distinct(WL_ID_CODE)

cat(
  "\nPediatric candidates in ptr_hrhl:",
  nrow(ptr_ped_ids),
  "\n"
)

cat("With ventilation forms in thoracic_stat1a:\n")

thoracic_stat1a %>%
  filter(
    WL_ID_CODE %in% ptr_ped_ids$WL_ID_CODE
  ) %>%
  summarise(
    n_rows = n(),
    n_candidates = n_distinct(WL_ID_CODE),
    n_ever_vent = n_distinct(
      WL_ID_CODE[
        REQ1_CONTINUOUS_VENTILATION == 1
      ]
    )
  ) %>%
  print()

cat("\nREQ5_CIRCULATORY_DEVICE (MCS flag):\n")

thoracic_stat1a %>%
  filter(
    WL_ID_CODE %in% ptr_ped_ids$WL_ID_CODE
  ) %>%
  count(REQ5_CIRCULATORY_DEVICE) %>%
  print()


# ── Step 1: Add donor age to PTR study data ──────────────────────
ptr_study <- ptr_hrhl %>%
  filter(
    WL_ORG %in% c("HR", "HL"),
    as.Date(MATCH_SUBMIT_DT) >= as.Date("2019-01-01"),
    as.Date(MATCH_SUBMIT_DT) <= as.Date("2024-12-31")
  ) %>%
  mutate(
    MATCH_SUBMIT_DT = as.Date(MATCH_SUBMIT_DT)
  ) %>%
  left_join(
    deceased_donor_data %>%
      dplyr::select(
        DONOR_ID,
        AGE_DON,
        ABO_DON
      ),
    by = "DONOR_ID"
  ) %>%
  mutate(
    is_adult_donor = !is.na(AGE_DON) & AGE_DON >= 18,
    is_ped_donor   = !is.na(AGE_DON) & AGE_DON < 18,
    class_prefix = as.numeric(
      gsub(
        "-.*",
        "",
        trimws(CLASS_ID)
      )
    )
  )


# ── Step 2: Keep match runs containing any pediatric candidate ───
cat(
  "Total pediatric HR candidates (all years):",
  nrow(all_ped_ids),
  "\n"
)

ptr_ped_runs <- ptr_study %>%
  group_by(MATCH_ID_CODE) %>%
  filter(
    any(
      WL_ID_CODE %in% all_ped_ids$WL_ID_CODE
    )
  ) %>%
  ungroup() %>%
  mutate(
    is_ped_candidate =
      WL_ID_CODE %in% all_ped_ids$WL_ID_CODE
  )

cat(
  "Match runs with any ped candidate:",
  n_distinct(ptr_ped_runs$MATCH_ID_CODE),
  "\n"
)

cat(
  "Pediatric candidate rows:",
  sum(ptr_ped_runs$is_ped_candidate),
  "\n"
)

cat(
  "Total rows on these match runs:",
  nrow(ptr_ped_runs),
  "\n"
)


# ── Step 3: Flag pediatric Status 1A classifications ──────────────
# Rows with missing donor age cannot be assigned to an adult- or
# pediatric-donor classification family.

ped_1a_adult_donor_prefixes <- c(
  100, 200, 700, 800, 2100, 2200,
  3300, 3400, 4500, 4600
)

ped_1a_ped_donor_prefixes <- c(
  100, 200, 2900, 3000, 5100, 5200,
  6900, 7000, 8700, 8800
)

ptr_ped_runs <- ptr_ped_runs %>%
  mutate(
    is_ped_1a_class = case_when(
      is_adult_donor &
        class_prefix %in%
        ped_1a_adult_donor_prefixes ~ TRUE,
      
      is_ped_donor &
        class_prefix %in%
        ped_1a_ped_donor_prefixes ~ TRUE,
      
      TRUE ~ FALSE
    )
  )

cat("\nPed 1A classification check:\n")

ptr_ped_runs %>%
  filter(is_ped_candidate) %>%
  count(is_ped_1a_class) %>%
  print()


# ── Step 4: Build current ventilation flag ───────────────────────

ped_on_runs <- ptr_ped_runs %>%
  filter(is_ped_candidate) %>%
  dplyr::select(
    MATCH_ID_CODE,
    WL_ID_CODE,
    MATCH_SUBMIT_DT,
    PTR_SEQUENCE_NUM,
    class_prefix,
    is_ped_1a_class,
    is_adult_donor,
    is_ped_donor
  ) %>%
  as_tibble()

vent_tv <- thoracic_stat1a %>%
  filter(
    WL_ID_CODE %in% all_ped_ids$WL_ID_CODE,
    !is.na(REQ1_CONTINUOUS_VENTILATION)
  ) %>%
  mutate(
    UPGRADE_EXTDATE = as.Date(UPGRADE_EXTDATE)
  ) %>%
  dplyr::select(
    WL_ID_CODE,
    UPGRADE_EXTDATE,
    REQ1_CONTINUOUS_VENTILATION
  ) %>%
  arrange(
    WL_ID_CODE,
    UPGRADE_EXTDATE
  )

cat("Adding ventilation flags...\n")

# Preserve every pediatric candidate-match-run observation.
# When a candidate has forms, but all forms occur after the match-run date,
# the candidate is treated as not ventilated at that match-run date.
vent_at_match <- ped_on_runs %>%
  left_join(
    vent_tv,
    by = "WL_ID_CODE",
    relationship = "many-to-many"
  ) %>%
  mutate(
    eligible_form =
      !is.na(UPGRADE_EXTDATE) &
      UPGRADE_EXTDATE <= MATCH_SUBMIT_DT
  ) %>%
  group_by(
    MATCH_ID_CODE,
    WL_ID_CODE,
    MATCH_SUBMIT_DT,
    PTR_SEQUENCE_NUM
  ) %>%
  arrange(
    desc(eligible_form),
    desc(UPGRADE_EXTDATE),
    .by_group = TRUE
  ) %>%
  slice(1) %>%
  ungroup() %>%
  mutate(
    on_vent_raw = case_when(
      eligible_form ~
        as.integer(REQ1_CONTINUOUS_VENTILATION == 1),
      TRUE ~ 0L
    ),
    on_vent = if_else(
      is_ped_1a_class,
      on_vent_raw,
      0L
    )
  ) %>%
  dplyr::select(
    MATCH_ID_CODE,
    WL_ID_CODE,
    MATCH_SUBMIT_DT,
    PTR_SEQUENCE_NUM,
    class_prefix,
    is_ped_1a_class,
    is_adult_donor,
    is_ped_donor,
    on_vent
  )

cat(
  "Pediatric match-run rows before ventilation assignment:",
  nrow(ped_on_runs),
  "\n"
)

cat(
  "Pediatric match-run rows after ventilation assignment:",
  nrow(vent_at_match),
  "\n"
)

if (nrow(vent_at_match) != nrow(ped_on_runs)) {
  stop("Ventilation assignment lost pediatric match-run rows.")
}

cat(
  "Ventilated pediatric rows:",
  sum(vent_at_match$on_vent == 1),
  "\n"
)

cat(
  "Nonventilated pediatric rows:",
  sum(vent_at_match$on_vent == 0),
  "\n"
)


# ── Step 5: Build current ECMO flag ───────────────────────────────

ecmo_tv <- thoracic_mcs_device %>%
  filter(
    WL_ID_CODE %in% all_ped_ids$WL_ID_CODE,
    DEVICE_TYPE %in% c(
      "ECMO",
      "VA ECMO",
      "VV ECMO"
    )
  ) %>%
  mutate(
    IMPLANT_DATE = as.Date(IMPLANT_DATE),
    EXPLANT_DATE = as.Date(EXPLANT_DATE)
  ) %>%
  dplyr::select(
    WL_ID_CODE,
    IMPLANT_DATE,
    EXPLANT_DATE
  )

ecmo_at_match <- ped_on_runs %>%
  left_join(
    ecmo_tv,
    by = "WL_ID_CODE",
    relationship = "many-to-many"
  ) %>%
  filter(
    !is.na(IMPLANT_DATE),
    IMPLANT_DATE <= MATCH_SUBMIT_DT,
    is.na(EXPLANT_DATE) |
      EXPLANT_DATE > MATCH_SUBMIT_DT
  ) %>%
  distinct(
    MATCH_ID_CODE,
    WL_ID_CODE,
    MATCH_SUBMIT_DT,
    PTR_SEQUENCE_NUM
  ) %>%
  mutate(
    on_ecmo = 1L
  )

cat(
  "ECMO pediatric rows:",
  nrow(ecmo_at_match),
  "\n"
)


# ── Step 6: Combine Status 1A with ventilation/ECMO ───────────────
# New Status 1 requires:
#   pediatric Status 1A
#   AND
#   ECMO or continuous mechanical ventilation

primary_prefixes <- c(
  100, 700, 2100, 3300, 4500,
  2900, 5100, 6900, 8700
)

ped_flags <- vent_at_match %>%
  left_join(
    ecmo_at_match,
    by = c(
      "MATCH_ID_CODE",
      "WL_ID_CODE",
      "MATCH_SUBMIT_DT",
      "PTR_SEQUENCE_NUM"
    )
  ) %>%
  mutate(
    on_ecmo = replace_na(
      on_ecmo,
      0L
    ),
    new_status1 = as.integer(
      is_ped_1a_class &
        (
          on_vent == 1 |
            on_ecmo == 1
        )
    ),
    is_primary =
      class_prefix %in% primary_prefixes
  )

cat("\nNew Status 1 distribution:\n")

ped_flags %>%
  count(
    is_ped_1a_class,
    on_vent,
    on_ecmo,
    new_status1
  ) %>%
  print()

if (nrow(ped_flags) != nrow(ped_on_runs)) {
  stop("Support-status assignment lost pediatric match-run rows.")
}


# ── Step 7: Build Status 1A history ───────────────────────────────

cat("Calculating tier-specific waiting times...\n")

status_hx_1a <- ped_hx_snap %>%
  filter(
    WL_ID_CODE %in% all_ped_ids$WL_ID_CODE,
    UNOS_CAND_STAT_CD == 2010
  ) %>%
  mutate(
    CHG_DATE = as.Date(CHG_DATE),
    CHG_END_DATE = as.Date(CHG_END_DATE)
  ) %>%
  dplyr::select(
    WL_ID_CODE,
    CHG_DATE,
    CHG_END_DATE
  )


# ── Step 7a: Total cumulative active Status 1A time ───────────────

waiting_time_1a <- ped_on_runs %>%
  left_join(
    status_hx_1a,
    by = "WL_ID_CODE",
    relationship = "many-to-many"
  ) %>%
  filter(
    !is.na(CHG_DATE),
    CHG_DATE <= MATCH_SUBMIT_DT
  ) %>%
  mutate(
    period_end = if_else(
      is.na(CHG_END_DATE) |
        CHG_END_DATE > MATCH_SUBMIT_DT,
      MATCH_SUBMIT_DT,
      CHG_END_DATE
    ),
    days_counted = as.numeric(
      period_end - CHG_DATE
    )
  ) %>%
  filter(days_counted > 0) %>%
  group_by(
    MATCH_ID_CODE,
    WL_ID_CODE,
    MATCH_SUBMIT_DT,
    PTR_SEQUENCE_NUM
  ) %>%
  summarise(
    days_1a = sum(
      days_counted,
      na.rm = TRUE
    ),
    .groups = "drop"
  )


# ── Step 7b: Reconstruct ventilation episodes ─────────────────────

vent_snap_allped <- thoracic_stat1a %>%
  filter(
    WL_ID_CODE %in% all_ped_ids$WL_ID_CODE,
    !is.na(REQ1_CONTINUOUS_VENTILATION)
  ) %>%
  mutate(
    UPGRADE_EXTDATE = as.Date(UPGRADE_EXTDATE)
  ) %>%
  dplyr::select(
    WL_ID_CODE,
    UPGRADE_EXTDATE,
    REQ1_CONTINUOUS_VENTILATION
  ) %>%
  arrange(
    WL_ID_CODE,
    UPGRADE_EXTDATE
  )

vent_episodes_allped <- vent_snap_allped %>%
  group_by(WL_ID_CODE) %>%
  arrange(
    UPGRADE_EXTDATE,
    .by_group = TRUE
  ) %>%
  mutate(
    vent_on = as.integer(
      REQ1_CONTINUOUS_VENTILATION == 1
    ),
    prev_vent = lag(
      vent_on,
      default = 0L
    ),
    episode_start =
      vent_on == 1 &
      prev_vent == 0,
    episode_id =
      cumsum(episode_start) *
      vent_on
  ) %>%
  filter(vent_on == 1) %>%
  group_by(
    WL_ID_CODE,
    episode_id
  ) %>%
  summarise(
    vent_start = min(
      UPGRADE_EXTDATE
    ),
    .groups = "drop"
  ) %>%
  left_join(
    vent_snap_allped %>%
      filter(
        REQ1_CONTINUOUS_VENTILATION != 1
      ) %>%
      dplyr::select(
        WL_ID_CODE,
        vent_off_date = UPGRADE_EXTDATE
      ),
    by = "WL_ID_CODE",
    relationship = "many-to-many"
  ) %>%
  filter(
    is.na(vent_off_date) |
      vent_off_date > vent_start
  ) %>%
  group_by(
    WL_ID_CODE,
    episode_id,
    vent_start
  ) %>%
  summarise(
    vent_end = if (
      all(is.na(vent_off_date))
    ) {
      as.Date(NA)
    } else {
      min(
        vent_off_date,
        na.rm = TRUE
      )
    },
    .groups = "drop"
  ) %>%
  dplyr::select(
    WL_ID_CODE,
    vent_start,
    vent_end
  )


# ── Step 7c: Interval-union helper ────────────────────────────────

union_days_match <- function(starts, ends) {
  valid <-
    !is.na(starts) &
    !is.na(ends) &
    ends > starts
  
  starts <- starts[valid]
  ends <- ends[valid]
  
  if (length(starts) == 0) {
    return(0)
  }
  
  ord <- order(
    starts,
    ends
  )
  
  starts <- starts[ord]
  ends <- ends[ord]
  
  total <- 0
  current_start <- starts[1]
  current_end <- ends[1]
  
  if (length(starts) > 1) {
    for (i in 2:length(starts)) {
      if (starts[i] <= current_end) {
        current_end <- max(
          current_end,
          ends[i]
        )
      } else {
        total <- total +
          as.numeric(
            current_end -
              current_start
          )
        
        current_start <- starts[i]
        current_end <- ends[i]
      }
    }
  }
  
  total <- total +
    as.numeric(
      current_end -
        current_start
    )
  
  total
}


# ── Step 7d: Status 1A intervals through each match-run date ──────

status1a_intervals_match <- ped_on_runs %>%
  left_join(
    status_hx_1a,
    by = "WL_ID_CODE",
    relationship = "many-to-many"
  ) %>%
  filter(
    !is.na(CHG_DATE),
    CHG_DATE <= MATCH_SUBMIT_DT
  ) %>%
  transmute(
    MATCH_ID_CODE,
    WL_ID_CODE,
    MATCH_SUBMIT_DT,
    PTR_SEQUENCE_NUM,
    status_start = CHG_DATE,
    status_end = if_else(
      is.na(CHG_END_DATE) |
        CHG_END_DATE > MATCH_SUBMIT_DT,
      MATCH_SUBMIT_DT,
      CHG_END_DATE
    )
  ) %>%
  filter(
    status_end > status_start
  )


# ── Step 7e: ECMO intervals through each match-run date ───────────

ecmo_intervals_match <- ped_on_runs %>%
  left_join(
    ecmo_tv,
    by = "WL_ID_CODE",
    relationship = "many-to-many"
  ) %>%
  filter(
    !is.na(IMPLANT_DATE),
    IMPLANT_DATE <= MATCH_SUBMIT_DT
  ) %>%
  transmute(
    MATCH_ID_CODE,
    WL_ID_CODE,
    MATCH_SUBMIT_DT,
    PTR_SEQUENCE_NUM,
    support_start = IMPLANT_DATE,
    support_end = if_else(
      is.na(EXPLANT_DATE) |
        EXPLANT_DATE > MATCH_SUBMIT_DT,
      MATCH_SUBMIT_DT,
      EXPLANT_DATE
    )
  ) %>%
  filter(
    support_end > support_start
  )


# ── Step 7f: Ventilation intervals through each match-run date ────

vent_intervals_match <- ped_on_runs %>%
  left_join(
    vent_episodes_allped,
    by = "WL_ID_CODE",
    relationship = "many-to-many"
  ) %>%
  filter(
    !is.na(vent_start),
    vent_start <= MATCH_SUBMIT_DT
  ) %>%
  transmute(
    MATCH_ID_CODE,
    WL_ID_CODE,
    MATCH_SUBMIT_DT,
    PTR_SEQUENCE_NUM,
    support_start = vent_start,
    support_end = if_else(
      is.na(vent_end) |
        vent_end > MATCH_SUBMIT_DT,
      MATCH_SUBMIT_DT,
      vent_end
    )
  ) %>%
  filter(
    support_end > support_start
  )


# ── Step 7g: Combine support intervals ────────────────────────────

support_intervals_match <- bind_rows(
  ecmo_intervals_match,
  vent_intervals_match
)


# ── Step 7h: Intersect support with Status 1A ─────────────────────

ns1_intervals_match <- support_intervals_match %>%
  inner_join(
    status1a_intervals_match,
    by = c(
      "MATCH_ID_CODE",
      "WL_ID_CODE",
      "MATCH_SUBMIT_DT",
      "PTR_SEQUENCE_NUM"
    ),
    relationship = "many-to-many"
  ) %>%
  filter(
    support_start < status_end,
    status_start < support_end
  ) %>%
  transmute(
    MATCH_ID_CODE,
    WL_ID_CODE,
    MATCH_SUBMIT_DT,
    PTR_SEQUENCE_NUM,
    ns1_start = pmax(
      support_start,
      status_start
    ),
    ns1_end = pmin(
      support_end,
      status_end
    )
  ) %>%
  filter(
    ns1_end > ns1_start
  )


# ── Step 7i: Cumulative nonoverlapping New Status 1 time ──────────

ns1_cumul_match <- ns1_intervals_match %>%
  group_by(
    MATCH_ID_CODE,
    WL_ID_CODE,
    MATCH_SUBMIT_DT,
    PTR_SEQUENCE_NUM
  ) %>%
  summarise(
    ns1_days = union_days_match(
      ns1_start,
      ns1_end
    ),
    .groups = "drop"
  )


# ── Step 7j: Assemble tier-specific waiting times ─────────────────

tier_waiting_time_match <- ped_on_runs %>%
  dplyr::select(
    MATCH_ID_CODE,
    WL_ID_CODE,
    MATCH_SUBMIT_DT,
    PTR_SEQUENCE_NUM
  ) %>%
  distinct() %>%
  left_join(
    waiting_time_1a,
    by = c(
      "MATCH_ID_CODE",
      "WL_ID_CODE",
      "MATCH_SUBMIT_DT",
      "PTR_SEQUENCE_NUM"
    )
  ) %>%
  left_join(
    ns1_cumul_match,
    by = c(
      "MATCH_ID_CODE",
      "WL_ID_CODE",
      "MATCH_SUBMIT_DT",
      "PTR_SEQUENCE_NUM"
    )
  ) %>%
  mutate(
    days_1a = replace_na(
      days_1a,
      0
    ),
    ns1_days = replace_na(
      ns1_days,
      0
    ),
    ns2_days = pmax(
      days_1a - ns1_days,
      0
    )
  )

cat("\nTier-specific waiting-time summary:\n")

tier_waiting_time_match %>%
  summarise(
    median_total_1a = median(
      days_1a,
      na.rm = TRUE
    ),
    median_ns1 = median(
      ns1_days,
      na.rm = TRUE
    ),
    median_ns2 = median(
      ns2_days,
      na.rm = TRUE
    ),
    max_total_1a = max(
      days_1a,
      na.rm = TRUE
    ),
    max_ns1 = max(
      ns1_days,
      na.rm = TRUE
    ),
    max_ns2 = max(
      ns2_days,
      na.rm = TRUE
    )
  ) %>%
  print()

if (
  any(
    tier_waiting_time_match$ns1_days >
    tier_waiting_time_match$days_1a +
    1e-8,
    na.rm = TRUE
  )
) {
  stop(
    paste(
      "At least one candidate-match-run observation",
      "has New Status 1 time exceeding total Status 1A time."
    )
  )
}


# Keep your existing classification_crosswalk definition here.


# ── Step 8: Build counterfactual pediatric classifications ────────

join_keys <- c(
  "MATCH_ID_CODE",
  "WL_ID_CODE",
  "MATCH_SUBMIT_DT",
  "PTR_SEQUENCE_NUM"
)

ptr_cf <- ped_flags %>%
  left_join(
    tier_waiting_time_match,
    by = join_keys
  ) %>%
  mutate(
    days_1a = replace_na(
      days_1a,
      0
    ),
    ns1_days = replace_na(
      ns1_days,
      0
    ),
    ns2_days = coalesce(
      ns2_days,
      pmax(
        days_1a - ns1_days,
        0
      )
    ),
    wait_days_tier = if_else(
      new_status1 == 1,
      ns1_days,
      ns2_days
    ),
    donor_type = case_when(
      is_adult_donor ~ "adult",
      is_ped_donor ~ "ped",
      TRUE ~ NA_character_
    )
  ) %>%
  left_join(
    classification_crosswalk,
    by = c(
      "donor_type",
      "class_prefix" = "old_class_prefix"
    )
  ) %>%
  mutate(
    classification_cf = case_when(
      new_status1 == 1 ~ new_row_if_status1,
      new_status1 == 0 ~ new_row_if_status0,
      TRUE ~ NA_real_
    )
  )

cat("\nCounterfactual pediatric-row checks:\n")

cat(
  "Pediatric rows:",
  nrow(ptr_cf),
  "\n"
)

cat(
  "Rows with missing donor type:",
  sum(is.na(ptr_cf$donor_type)),
  "\n"
)

cat(
  "Rows without a counterfactual classification:",
  sum(is.na(ptr_cf$classification_cf)),
  "\n"
)

cat(
  "Rows where crosswalk 1A flag disagrees with match-run flag:",
  sum(
    !is.na(ptr_cf$is_1a) &
      ptr_cf$is_1a != ptr_cf$is_ped_1a_class,
    na.rm = TRUE
  ),
  "\n"
)

cat(
  "Pediatric rows expected from ped_on_runs:",
  nrow(ped_on_runs),
  "\n"
)

if (nrow(ptr_cf) != nrow(ped_on_runs)) {
  stop("Counterfactual pediatric classification lost match-run rows.")
}

cat("\nTier-specific waiting-time summary:\n")

ptr_cf %>%
  group_by(new_status1) %>%
  summarise(
    n = n(),
    median_wt = median(
      wait_days_tier,
      na.rm = TRUE
    ),
    mean_wt = round(
      mean(
        wait_days_tier,
        na.rm = TRUE
      ),
      1
    ),
    .groups = "drop"
  ) %>%
  print()


# ── Step 9: Build complete counterfactual match runs ──────────────

all_on_runs_unfiltered <- ptr_ped_runs %>%
  as_tibble() %>%
  dplyr::select(
    MATCH_ID_CODE,
    WL_ID_CODE,
    PTR_SEQUENCE_NUM,
    class_prefix,
    is_ped_candidate,
    is_ped_1a_class,
    is_adult_donor,
    is_ped_donor,
    MATCH_SUBMIT_DT,
    OFFER_ACCEPT,
    PTR_CLOSE_NUM
  ) %>%
  left_join(
    ptr_cf %>%
      dplyr::select(
        MATCH_ID_CODE,
        WL_ID_CODE,
        PTR_SEQUENCE_NUM,
        classification_cf,
        wait_days_tier,
        new_status1,
        on_vent,
        on_ecmo
      ),
    by = c(
      "MATCH_ID_CODE",
      "WL_ID_CODE",
      "PTR_SEQUENCE_NUM"
    )
  ) %>%
  mutate(
    donor_type_lookup = case_when(
      is_adult_donor ~ "adult",
      is_ped_donor ~ "ped",
      TRUE ~ NA_character_
    )
  ) %>%
  left_join(
    classification_crosswalk %>%
      dplyr::select(
        donor_type,
        old_class_prefix,
        new_row_if_status0
      ),
    by = c(
      "donor_type_lookup" = "donor_type",
      "class_prefix" = "old_class_prefix"
    )
  ) %>%
  mutate(
    classification_cf = case_when(
      !is.na(classification_cf) ~ classification_cf,
      !is.na(new_row_if_status0) ~ new_row_if_status0,
      TRUE ~ NA_real_
    ),
    wait_days_tier = replace_na(
      wait_days_tier,
      0
    ),
    sort_key2 = case_when(
      is_ped_candidate &
        is_ped_1a_class ~ -wait_days_tier,
      TRUE ~ as.numeric(PTR_SEQUENCE_NUM)
    ),
    sort_key3 = as.numeric(
      PTR_SEQUENCE_NUM
    )
  )


# ── Diagnose reconstruction failures before filtering ─────────────

failed_cf_rows <- all_on_runs_unfiltered %>%
  filter(
    is.na(classification_cf)
  ) %>%
  mutate(
    failure_reason = case_when(
      is.na(donor_type_lookup) ~
        "Missing donor age/type",
      is.na(class_prefix) ~
        "Missing or unparseable classification prefix",
      is.na(new_row_if_status0) ~
        "Classification prefix absent from crosswalk",
      TRUE ~ "Other"
    )
  )

cat("\n=== COUNTERFACTUAL RECONSTRUCTION FAILURES ===\n")

failed_cf_rows %>%
  count(
    failure_reason,
    sort = TRUE
  ) %>%
  print(n = Inf)

cat(
  "Rows with failed reconstruction:",
  nrow(failed_cf_rows),
  "\n"
)

cat(
  "Affected match runs:",
  n_distinct(failed_cf_rows$MATCH_ID_CODE),
  "\n"
)

cat("\nFailed prefixes with known donor type:\n")

failed_cf_rows %>%
  filter(
    !is.na(donor_type_lookup)
  ) %>%
  count(
    donor_type_lookup,
    class_prefix,
    sort = TRUE
  ) %>%
  print(n = Inf)


# Remove only genuinely unclassifiable rows after displaying the reason.

all_on_runs <- all_on_runs_unfiltered %>%
  filter(
    !is.na(classification_cf)
  )

cat(
  "\nRows before reconstruction filter:",
  nrow(all_on_runs_unfiltered),
  "\n"
)

cat(
  "Rows after reconstruction filter:",
  nrow(all_on_runs),
  "\n"
)

cat(
  "Original match runs:",
  n_distinct(ptr_ped_runs$MATCH_ID_CODE),
  "\n"
)

cat(
  "Match runs remaining after filter:",
  n_distinct(all_on_runs$MATCH_ID_CODE),
  "\n"
)


# ── Resequence counterfactual match runs ──────────────────────────

ptr_resequenced <- all_on_runs %>%
  group_by(MATCH_ID_CODE) %>%
  arrange(
    classification_cf,
    sort_key2,
    sort_key3,
    .by_group = TRUE
  ) %>%
  mutate(
    new_sequence_cf = row_number(),
    sequence_change_cf =
      new_sequence_cf -
      PTR_SEQUENCE_NUM,
    positions_moved_cf =
      abs(sequence_change_cf),
    moved_up_cf =
      sequence_change_cf < 0,
    moved_down_cf =
      sequence_change_cf > 0
  ) %>%
  ungroup()

cat("\n=== 4-STATUS COUNTERFACTUAL COMPLETE ===\n")

cat(
  "Total rows:",
  nrow(ptr_resequenced),
  "\n"
)

cat(
  "Match runs:",
  n_distinct(ptr_resequenced$MATCH_ID_CODE),
  "\n"
)

cat(
  "Original match runs:",
  n_distinct(ptr_ped_runs$MATCH_ID_CODE),
  "\n"
)


# ── Step 10: Rank-change results ──────────────────────────────────

cat("\nRank change for pediatric Status 1A candidates:\n")

ptr_resequenced %>%
  filter(
    is_ped_candidate,
    is_ped_1a_class,
    !is.na(new_status1)
  ) %>%
  group_by(new_status1) %>%
  summarise(
    n = n(),
    median_current_rank = median(
      PTR_SEQUENCE_NUM,
      na.rm = TRUE
    ),
    median_new_rank = median(
      new_sequence_cf,
      na.rm = TRUE
    ),
    median_change = median(
      sequence_change_cf,
      na.rm = TRUE
    ),
    pct_moved_up = round(
      mean(
        moved_up_cf,
        na.rm = TRUE
      ) * 100,
      1
    ),
    pct_stayed_same = round(
      mean(
        sequence_change_cf == 0,
        na.rm = TRUE
      ) * 100,
      1
    ),
    pct_moved_down = round(
      mean(
        moved_down_cf,
        na.rm = TRUE
      ) * 100,
      1
    ),
    .groups = "drop"
  ) %>%
  print()


# ── Step 11: Displacement analysis ────────────────────────────────

displacement <- ptr_resequenced %>%
  filter(
    is_ped_candidate,
    is_ped_1a_class,
    !is.na(new_status1)
  ) %>%
  group_by(MATCH_ID_CODE) %>%
  summarise(
    has_status1 = any(
      new_status1 == 1,
      na.rm = TRUE
    ),
    has_status2 = any(
      new_status1 == 0,
      na.rm = TRUE
    ),
    min_rank_status1 = if (
      any(
        new_status1 == 1,
        na.rm = TRUE
      )
    ) {
      min(
        PTR_SEQUENCE_NUM[
          new_status1 == 1
        ],
        na.rm = TRUE
      )
    } else {
      NA_real_
    },
    min_rank_status2 = if (
      any(
        new_status1 == 0,
        na.rm = TRUE
      )
    ) {
      min(
        PTR_SEQUENCE_NUM[
          new_status1 == 0
        ],
        na.rm = TRUE
      )
    } else {
      NA_real_
    },
    .groups = "drop"
  ) %>%
  filter(
    has_status1,
    has_status2
  ) %>%
  mutate(
    status2_ranked_above =
      min_rank_status2 <
      min_rank_status1
  )

cat("\nDisplacement analysis:\n")

cat(
  "Match runs with both New Status 1 and New Status 2:",
  nrow(displacement),
  "\n"
)

cat(
  "Match runs where New Status 2 was originally above New Status 1:",
  sum(
    displacement$status2_ranked_above,
    na.rm = TRUE
  ),
  sprintf(
    "(%.1f%%)\n",
    mean(
      displacement$status2_ranked_above,
      na.rm = TRUE
    ) * 100
  )
)


# ── Step 12: Pediatric acceptance summary ─────────────────────────

ptr_all_ped <- ptr_resequenced %>%
  filter(
    is_ped_candidate
  )

acceptance_summary <- ptr_all_ped %>%
  summarise(
    n_match_runs =
      n_distinct(MATCH_ID_CODE),
    n_pediatric_acceptances =
      n_distinct(
        MATCH_ID_CODE[
          OFFER_ACCEPT == "Y"
        ]
      ),
    acceptance_pct =
      100 *
      n_pediatric_acceptances /
      n_match_runs,
    median_acceptance_sequence =
      median(
        PTR_SEQUENCE_NUM[
          OFFER_ACCEPT == "Y"
        ],
        na.rm = TRUE
      ),
    q25_acceptance_sequence =
      quantile(
        PTR_SEQUENCE_NUM[
          OFFER_ACCEPT == "Y"
        ],
        0.25,
        na.rm = TRUE
      ),
    q75_acceptance_sequence =
      quantile(
        PTR_SEQUENCE_NUM[
          OFFER_ACCEPT == "Y"
        ],
        0.75,
        na.rm = TRUE
      )
  )

acceptance_summary

```

``` {r build counterfactual}

# ── Configuration ─────────────────────────────────────────────────
CONFIG_PED <- list(
  L_POINT       = 20L,   # Random deduplication draws for point estimates
  N_BOOT        = 1000L, # Candidate-clustered bootstrap iterations
  P_MAX         = 20L,
  TREND_P_MAX   = 20L,
  N_MIN         = 10L,
  T_HORIZON     = 90,
  ADMIN_TIME    = 90.01,
  SEED          = 20240414L,
  CONF_LEVEL    = 0.95
)

join_keys <- c(
  "MATCH_ID_CODE",
  "WL_ID_CODE",
  "MATCH_SUBMIT_DT",
  "PTR_SEQUENCE_NUM"
)


# ── Classification crosswalk ──────────────────────────────────────
# Current allocation classification code mapped to its corresponding
# row in the counterfactual allocation sequence.
#
# new_row_if_status1 applies to Status 1A candidates on ECMO or
# continuous mechanical ventilation.
#
# new_row_if_status0 applies to all remaining candidates.

classification_crosswalk <- tribble(
  ~donor_type, ~old_class_prefix, ~is_1a, ~new_row_if_status1, ~new_row_if_status0,
  "adult", 100, TRUE, 1, 3,
  "adult", 200, TRUE, 2, 4,
  "adult", 300, FALSE, 5, 5,
  "adult", 400, FALSE, 6, 6,
  "adult", 500, FALSE, 7, 7,
  "adult", 600, FALSE, 8, 8,
  "adult", 700, TRUE, 9, 11,
  "adult", 800, TRUE, 10, 12,
  "adult", 900, FALSE, 13, 13,
  "adult", 1000, FALSE, 14, 14,
  "adult", 1100, FALSE, 15, 15,
  "adult", 1200, FALSE, 16, 16,
  "adult", 1300, FALSE, 17, 17,
  "adult", 1400, FALSE, 18, 18,
  "adult", 1500, FALSE, 19, 19,
  "adult", 1600, FALSE, 20, 20,
  "adult", 1700, FALSE, 21, 21,
  "adult", 1800, FALSE, 22, 22,
  "adult", 1900, FALSE, 23, 23,
  "adult", 2000, FALSE, 24, 24,
  "adult", 2100, TRUE, 25, 27,
  "adult", 2200, TRUE, 26, 28,
  "adult", 2300, FALSE, 29, 29,
  "adult", 2400, FALSE, 30, 30,
  "adult", 2500, FALSE, 31, 31,
  "adult", 2600, FALSE, 32, 32,
  "adult", 2700, FALSE, 33, 33,
  "adult", 2800, FALSE, 34, 34,
  "adult", 2900, FALSE, 35, 35,
  "adult", 3000, FALSE, 36, 36,
  "adult", 3100, FALSE, 37, 37,
  "adult", 3200, FALSE, 38, 38,
  "adult", 3300, TRUE, 39, 41,
  "adult", 3400, TRUE, 40, 42,
  "adult", 3500, FALSE, 43, 43,
  "adult", 3600, FALSE, 44, 44,
  "adult", 3700, FALSE, 45, 45,
  "adult", 3800, FALSE, 46, 46,
  "adult", 3900, FALSE, 47, 47,
  "adult", 4000, FALSE, 48, 48,
  "adult", 4100, FALSE, 49, 49,
  "adult", 4200, FALSE, 50, 50,
  "adult", 4300, FALSE, 51, 51,
  "adult", 4400, FALSE, 52, 52,
  "adult", 4500, TRUE, 53, 55,
  "adult", 4600, TRUE, 54, 56,
  "adult", 4700, FALSE, 57, 57,
  "adult", 4800, FALSE, 58, 58,
  "adult", 4900, FALSE, 59, 59,
  "adult", 5000, FALSE, 60, 60,
  "adult", 5100, FALSE, 61, 61,
  "adult", 5200, FALSE, 62, 62,
  "adult", 5300, FALSE, 63, 63,
  "adult", 5400, FALSE, 64, 64,
  "adult", 5500, FALSE, 65, 65,
  "adult", 5600, FALSE, 66, 66,
  "adult", 5700, FALSE, 67, 67,
  "adult", 5800, FALSE, 68, 68,
  "adult", 5900, FALSE, 69, 69,
  "adult", 6000, FALSE, 70, 70,
  "adult", 6100, FALSE, 71, 71,
  "adult", 6200, FALSE, 72, 72,
  "adult", 6300, FALSE, 73, 73,
  "adult", 6400, FALSE, 74, 74,
  "adult", 6500, FALSE, 75, 75,
  "adult", 6600, FALSE, 76, 76,
  "adult", 6700, FALSE, 77, 77,
  "adult", 6800, FALSE, 78, 78,
  
  "ped", 100, TRUE, 1, 3,
  "ped", 200, TRUE, 2, 4,
  "ped", 300, FALSE, 5, 5,
  "ped", 400, FALSE, 6, 6,
  "ped", 500, FALSE, 7, 7,
  "ped", 600, FALSE, 8, 8,
  "ped", 700, FALSE, 9, 9,
  "ped", 800, FALSE, 10, 10,
  "ped", 900, FALSE, 11, 11,
  "ped", 1000, FALSE, 12, 12,
  "ped", 1100, FALSE, 13, 13,
  "ped", 1200, FALSE, 14, 14,
  "ped", 1300, FALSE, 15, 15,
  "ped", 1400, FALSE, 16, 16,
  "ped", 1500, FALSE, 17, 17,
  "ped", 1600, FALSE, 18, 18,
  "ped", 1700, FALSE, 19, 19,
  "ped", 1800, FALSE, 20, 20,
  "ped", 1900, FALSE, 21, 21,
  "ped", 2000, FALSE, 22, 22,
  "ped", 2100, FALSE, 23, 23,
  "ped", 2200, FALSE, 24, 24,
  "ped", 2300, FALSE, 25, 25,
  "ped", 2400, FALSE, 26, 26,
  "ped", 2500, FALSE, 27, 27,
  "ped", 2600, FALSE, 28, 28,
  "ped", 2700, FALSE, 29, 29,
  "ped", 2800, FALSE, 30, 30,
  "ped", 2900, TRUE, 31, 33,
  "ped", 3000, TRUE, 32, 34,
  "ped", 3100, FALSE, 35, 35,
  "ped", 3200, FALSE, 36, 36,
  "ped", 3300, FALSE, 37, 37,
  "ped", 3400, FALSE, 38, 38,
  "ped", 3500, FALSE, 39, 39,
  "ped", 3600, FALSE, 40, 40,
  "ped", 3700, FALSE, 41, 41,
  "ped", 3800, FALSE, 42, 42,
  "ped", 3900, FALSE, 43, 43,
  "ped", 4000, FALSE, 44, 44,
  "ped", 4100, FALSE, 45, 45,
  "ped", 4200, FALSE, 46, 46,
  "ped", 4300, FALSE, 47, 47,
  "ped", 4400, FALSE, 48, 48,
  "ped", 4500, FALSE, 49, 49,
  "ped", 4600, FALSE, 50, 50,
  "ped", 4700, FALSE, 51, 51,
  "ped", 4800, FALSE, 52, 52,
  "ped", 4900, FALSE, 53, 53,
  "ped", 5000, FALSE, 54, 54,
  "ped", 5100, TRUE, 55, 57,
  "ped", 5200, TRUE, 56, 58,
  "ped", 5300, FALSE, 59, 59,
  "ped", 5400, FALSE, 60, 60,
  "ped", 5500, FALSE, 61, 61,
  "ped", 5600, FALSE, 62, 62,
  "ped", 5700, FALSE, 63, 63,
  "ped", 5800, FALSE, 64, 64,
  "ped", 5900, FALSE, 65, 65,
  "ped", 6000, FALSE, 66, 66,
  "ped", 6100, FALSE, 67, 67,
  "ped", 6200, FALSE, 68, 68,
  "ped", 6300, FALSE, 69, 69,
  "ped", 6400, FALSE, 70, 70,
  "ped", 6500, FALSE, 71, 71,
  "ped", 6600, FALSE, 72, 72,
  "ped", 6700, FALSE, 73, 73,
  "ped", 6800, FALSE, 74, 74,
  "ped", 6900, TRUE, 75, 77,
  "ped", 7000, TRUE, 76, 78,
  "ped", 7100, FALSE, 79, 79,
  "ped", 7200, FALSE, 80, 80,
  "ped", 7300, FALSE, 81, 81,
  "ped", 7400, FALSE, 82, 82,
  "ped", 7500, FALSE, 83, 83,
  "ped", 7600, FALSE, 84, 84,
  "ped", 7700, FALSE, 85, 85,
  "ped", 7800, FALSE, 86, 86,
  "ped", 7900, FALSE, 87, 87,
  "ped", 8000, FALSE, 88, 88,
  "ped", 8100, FALSE, 89, 89,
  "ped", 8200, FALSE, 90, 90,
  "ped", 8300, FALSE, 91, 91,
  "ped", 8400, FALSE, 92, 92,
  "ped", 8500, FALSE, 93, 93,
  "ped", 8600, FALSE, 94, 94,
  "ped", 8700, TRUE, 95, 97,
  "ped", 8800, TRUE, 96, 98,
  "ped", 8900, FALSE, 99, 99,
  "ped", 9000, FALSE, 100, 100,
  "ped", 9100, FALSE, 101, 101,
  "ped", 9200, FALSE, 102, 102,
  "ped", 9300, FALSE, 103, 103,
  "ped", 9400, FALSE, 104, 104,
  "ped", 9500, FALSE, 105, 105,
  "ped", 9600, FALSE, 106, 106,
  "ped", 9700, FALSE, 107, 107,
  "ped", 9800, FALSE, 108, 108,
  "ped", 9900, FALSE, 109, 109,
  "ped", 10000, FALSE, 110, 110,
  "ped", 10100, FALSE, 111, 111,
  "ped", 10200, FALSE, 112, 112,
  "ped", 10300, FALSE, 113, 113,
  "ped", 10400, FALSE, 114, 114
)


# ── Step 8: Build pediatric counterfactual classifications ────────
# tier_waiting_time_match was built in the preceding chunk and
# contains the corrected:
#
#   days_1a
#   ns1_days = Status 1A ∩ (ECMO ∪ ventilation)
#   ns2_days = days_1a - ns1_days

ptr_cf <- ped_flags %>%
  left_join(
    tier_waiting_time_match,
    by = join_keys
  ) %>%
  mutate(
    days_1a  = replace_na(days_1a, 0),
    ns1_days = replace_na(ns1_days, 0),
    
    ns2_days = coalesce(
      ns2_days,
      pmax(days_1a - ns1_days, 0)
    ),
    
    wait_days_tier = if_else(
      new_status1 == 1,
      ns1_days,
      ns2_days
    ),
    
    donor_type = case_when(
      is_adult_donor ~ "adult",
      is_ped_donor   ~ "ped",
      TRUE           ~ NA_character_
    )
  ) %>%
  left_join(
    classification_crosswalk,
    by = c(
      "donor_type",
      "class_prefix" = "old_class_prefix"
    )
  ) %>%
  mutate(
    classification_cf = case_when(
      new_status1 == 1 ~ new_row_if_status1,
      new_status1 == 0 ~ new_row_if_status0,
      TRUE             ~ NA_real_
    )
  )

cat("\nCounterfactual crosswalk checks:\n")

cat(
  "Rows with missing donor type:",
  sum(is.na(ptr_cf$donor_type)),
  "\n"
)

cat(
  "Rows without a counterfactual classification:",
  sum(is.na(ptr_cf$classification_cf)),
  "\n"
)

cat(
  "Rows where crosswalk 1A flag disagrees with match-run flag:",
  sum(
    !is.na(ptr_cf$is_1a) &
      ptr_cf$is_1a != ptr_cf$is_ped_1a_class,
    na.rm = TRUE
  ),
  "\n"
)


# Exclude observations that cannot be placed in the crosswalk.
ptr_cf <- ptr_cf %>%
  filter(
    !is.na(classification_cf)
  )


cat("\nTier-specific waiting-time summary:\n")

ptr_cf %>%
  group_by(new_status1) %>%
  summarise(
    n = n(),
    median_wt = median(
      wait_days_tier,
      na.rm = TRUE
    ),
    mean_wt = round(
      mean(
        wait_days_tier,
        na.rm = TRUE
      ),
      1
    ),
    .groups = "drop"
  ) %>%
  print()


if (
  any(
    ptr_cf$ns1_days >
    ptr_cf$days_1a + 1e-8,
    na.rm = TRUE
  )
) {
  stop(
    "At least one observation has New Status 1 time exceeding total Status 1A time."
  )
}


# ── Step 9: Resequence every candidate on each match run ──────────
# Pediatric candidates receive their candidate-specific
# counterfactual classification from ptr_cf.
#
# All other candidates retain the corresponding non-New-Status-1
# crosswalk row.

all_on_runs <- ptr_ped_runs %>%
  as_tibble() %>%
  dplyr::select(
    MATCH_ID_CODE,
    WL_ID_CODE,
    PTR_SEQUENCE_NUM,
    class_prefix,
    is_ped_candidate,
    is_ped_1a_class,
    is_adult_donor,
    is_ped_donor,
    MATCH_SUBMIT_DT,
    OFFER_ACCEPT,
    PTR_CLOSE_NUM
  ) %>%
  left_join(
    ptr_cf %>%
      dplyr::select(
        MATCH_ID_CODE,
        WL_ID_CODE,
        PTR_SEQUENCE_NUM,
        classification_cf,
        wait_days_tier,
        new_status1,
        on_vent,
        on_ecmo
      ),
    by = c(
      "MATCH_ID_CODE",
      "WL_ID_CODE",
      "PTR_SEQUENCE_NUM"
    )
  ) %>%
  mutate(
    donor_type_lookup = case_when(
      is_adult_donor ~ "adult",
      is_ped_donor   ~ "ped",
      TRUE           ~ NA_character_
    )
  ) %>%
  left_join(
    classification_crosswalk %>%
      dplyr::select(
        donor_type,
        old_class_prefix,
        new_row_if_status0
      ),
    by = c(
      "donor_type_lookup" = "donor_type",
      "class_prefix" = "old_class_prefix"
    )
  ) %>%
  mutate(
    # Pediatric rows already classified in ptr_cf retain that
    # classification. All other rows use the standard/non-Status-1
    # crosswalk position.
    classification_cf = case_when(
      !is.na(classification_cf) ~ classification_cf,
      !is.na(new_row_if_status0) ~ new_row_if_status0,
      TRUE ~ NA_real_
    ),
    
    wait_days_tier = replace_na(
      wait_days_tier,
      0
    ),
    
    # For pediatric Status 1A rows, tier-specific waiting time orders
    # candidates within the new tier. For all other rows, preserve
    # current match-run order within their classification.
    sort_key2 = case_when(
      is_ped_candidate &
        is_ped_1a_class ~ -wait_days_tier,
      
      TRUE ~ as.numeric(PTR_SEQUENCE_NUM)
    ),
    
    # Deterministic tie-breaker.
    sort_key3 = as.numeric(PTR_SEQUENCE_NUM)
  )


cat(
  "\nRows excluded because no crosswalk classification was available:",
  sum(is.na(all_on_runs$classification_cf)),
  "\n"
)


all_on_runs <- all_on_runs %>%
  filter(
    !is.na(classification_cf)
  )


# Pediatric Status 1A rows should have a resolved new_status1 flag.
missing_ped_1a_flag <- all_on_runs %>%
  filter(
    is_ped_candidate,
    is_ped_1a_class,
    is.na(new_status1)
  )

cat(
  "Pediatric Status 1A rows without a resolved New Status flag:",
  nrow(missing_ped_1a_flag),
  "\n"
)


# Preserve the prior exclusion rule while making it explicit.
all_on_runs <- all_on_runs %>%
  filter(
    !(
      is_ped_candidate &
        is_ped_1a_class &
        is.na(new_status1)
    )
  )


ptr_resequenced <- all_on_runs %>%
  group_by(MATCH_ID_CODE) %>%
  arrange(
    classification_cf,
    sort_key2,
    sort_key3,
    .by_group = TRUE
  ) %>%
  mutate(
    new_sequence_cf = row_number(),
    
    sequence_change_cf =
      new_sequence_cf -
      PTR_SEQUENCE_NUM,
    
    positions_moved_cf =
      abs(sequence_change_cf),
    
    moved_up_cf =
      sequence_change_cf < 0,
    
    moved_down_cf =
      sequence_change_cf > 0
  ) %>%
  ungroup()


cat("\n=== 4-STATUS COUNTERFACTUAL COMPLETE ===\n")

cat(
  "Total rows:",
  nrow(ptr_resequenced),
  "\n"
)

cat(
  "Match runs:",
  n_distinct(ptr_resequenced$MATCH_ID_CODE),
  "\n"
)


# ── Step 10: Rank-change results ───────────────────────────────────
cat("\nRank change for pediatric Status 1A candidates:\n")

ptr_resequenced %>%
  filter(
    is_ped_candidate,
    is_ped_1a_class,
    !is.na(new_status1)
  ) %>%
  group_by(new_status1) %>%
  summarise(
    n = n(),
    
    median_current_rank = median(
      PTR_SEQUENCE_NUM,
      na.rm = TRUE
    ),
    
    median_new_rank = median(
      new_sequence_cf,
      na.rm = TRUE
    ),
    
    median_change = median(
      sequence_change_cf,
      na.rm = TRUE
    ),
    
    pct_moved_up = round(
      mean(
        moved_up_cf,
        na.rm = TRUE
      ) * 100,
      1
    ),
    
    pct_stayed_same = round(
      mean(
        sequence_change_cf == 0,
        na.rm = TRUE
      ) * 100,
      1
    ),
    
    pct_moved_down = round(
      mean(
        moved_down_cf,
        na.rm = TRUE
      ) * 100,
      1
    ),
    
    .groups = "drop"
  ) %>%
  print()


# ── Step 11: Displacement analysis ────────────────────────────────
displacement <- ptr_resequenced %>%
  filter(
    is_ped_candidate,
    is_ped_1a_class,
    !is.na(new_status1)
  ) %>%
  group_by(MATCH_ID_CODE) %>%
  summarise(
    has_status1 = any(
      new_status1 == 1,
      na.rm = TRUE
    ),
    
    has_status2 = any(
      new_status1 == 0,
      na.rm = TRUE
    ),
    
    min_rank_status1 = if (
      any(new_status1 == 1, na.rm = TRUE)
    ) {
      min(
        PTR_SEQUENCE_NUM[new_status1 == 1],
        na.rm = TRUE
      )
    } else {
      NA_real_
    },
    
    min_rank_status2 = if (
      any(new_status1 == 0, na.rm = TRUE)
    ) {
      min(
        PTR_SEQUENCE_NUM[new_status1 == 0],
        na.rm = TRUE
      )
    } else {
      NA_real_
    },
    
    .groups = "drop"
  ) %>%
  filter(
    has_status1,
    has_status2
  ) %>%
  mutate(
    status2_ranked_above =
      min_rank_status2 <
      min_rank_status1
  )


cat("\nDisplacement analysis:\n")

cat(
  "Match runs with both New Status 1 and New Status 2:",
  nrow(displacement),
  "\n"
)

cat(
  "Match runs where New Status 2 was originally above New Status 1:",
  sum(
    displacement$status2_ranked_above,
    na.rm = TRUE
  ),
  sprintf(
    "(%.1f%%)\n",
    mean(
      displacement$status2_ranked_above,
      na.rm = TRUE
    ) * 100
  )
)


cat("\nRank change — New Status 1 candidates:\n")

ptr_resequenced %>%
  filter(
    is_ped_candidate,
    is_ped_1a_class,
    new_status1 == 1
  ) %>%
  summarise(
    n = n(),
    
    median_current = median(
      PTR_SEQUENCE_NUM,
      na.rm = TRUE
    ),
    
    median_new = median(
      new_sequence_cf,
      na.rm = TRUE
    ),
    
    median_change = median(
      sequence_change_cf,
      na.rm = TRUE
    ),
    
    pct_up = round(
      mean(
        moved_up_cf,
        na.rm = TRUE
      ) * 100,
      1
    ),
    
    pct_same = round(
      mean(
        sequence_change_cf == 0,
        na.rm = TRUE
      ) * 100,
      1
    ),
    
    pct_down = round(
      mean(
        moved_down_cf,
        na.rm = TRUE
      ) * 100,
      1
    )
  ) %>%
  print()


cat("\nRank change — New Status 2 candidates:\n")

ptr_resequenced %>%
  filter(
    is_ped_candidate,
    is_ped_1a_class,
    new_status1 == 0
  ) %>%
  summarise(
    n = n(),
    
    median_current = median(
      PTR_SEQUENCE_NUM,
      na.rm = TRUE
    ),
    
    median_new = median(
      new_sequence_cf,
      na.rm = TRUE
    ),
    
    median_change = median(
      sequence_change_cf,
      na.rm = TRUE
    ),
    
    pct_up = round(
      mean(
        moved_up_cf,
        na.rm = TRUE
      ) * 100,
      1
    ),
    
    pct_same = round(
      mean(
        sequence_change_cf == 0,
        na.rm = TRUE
      ) * 100,
      1
    ),
    
    pct_down = round(
      mean(
        moved_down_cf,
        na.rm = TRUE
      ) * 100,
      1
    )
  ) %>%
  print()


# ── Step 12: Build outcome data ───────────────────────────────────
outcomes_all_ped <- thoracic_data %>%
  filter(
    WL_ORG == "HR",
    INIT_AGE < 18,
    as.Date(INIT_DATE) <=
      as.Date("2024-12-31")
  ) %>%
  mutate(
    END_DATE = as.Date(END_DATE),
    
    death = as.integer(
      REM_CD %in% c(8, 13)
    )
  ) %>%
  dplyr::select(
    WL_ID_CODE,
    END_DATE,
    death
  )


ptr_all_ped <- ptr_resequenced %>%
  filter(is_ped_candidate)


sys_current <- ptr_all_ped %>%
  dplyr::select(
    MATCH_ID_CODE,
    WL_ID_CODE,
    sequence = PTR_SEQUENCE_NUM,
    MATCH_SUBMIT_DT,
    OFFER_ACCEPT
  ) %>%
  mutate(
    System = "Current System"
  )


sys_cf <- ptr_all_ped %>%
  dplyr::select(
    MATCH_ID_CODE,
    WL_ID_CODE,
    sequence = new_sequence_cf,
    MATCH_SUBMIT_DT,
    OFFER_ACCEPT
  ) %>%
  mutate(
    System = "4-Status Counterfactual"
  )


outcome_long_all <- bind_rows(
  sys_current,
  sys_cf
) %>%
  left_join(
    outcomes_all_ped,
    by = "WL_ID_CODE"
  ) %>%
  mutate(
    MATCH_SUBMIT_DT =
      as.Date(MATCH_SUBMIT_DT),
    
    END_DATE =
      as.Date(END_DATE),
    
    death =
      replace_na(death, 0L),
    
    time_to_removal =
      as.numeric(
        END_DATE -
          MATCH_SUBMIT_DT
      ),
    
    # Same-day outcomes/removals receive a small positive time because
    # exact timestamps are unavailable.
    observed_time = case_when(
      is.na(time_to_removal) ~ NA_real_,
      time_to_removal < 0   ~ NA_real_,
      time_to_removal == 0  ~ 0.5,
      TRUE                  ~ time_to_removal
    ),
    
    # Death or removal for deterioration through and including day 90.
    event = as.integer(
      death == 1 &
        !is.na(observed_time) &
        observed_time <=
        CONFIG_PED$T_HORIZON
    ),
    
    # Event before or at day 90:
    # retain event time.
    #
    # Transplant/other removal before or at day 90:
    # censor at actual removal time.
    #
    # Event-free through day 90:
    # assign administrative follow-up just beyond day 90.
    time_days = case_when(
      event == 1 ~ observed_time,
      
      !is.na(observed_time) &
        observed_time <=
        CONFIG_PED$T_HORIZON ~ observed_time,
      
      TRUE ~ CONFIG_PED$ADMIN_TIME
    )
  ) %>%
  filter(
    !is.na(time_days),
    sequence >= 1,
    sequence <= CONFIG_PED$P_MAX
  ) %>%
  mutate(
    System = factor(
      System,
      levels = c(
        "Current System",
        "4-Status Counterfactual"
      )
    ),
    
    WL_ID_CODE =
      as.character(WL_ID_CODE)
  )


cat("\nOutcome dataset:\n")

cat(
  "Unique pediatric candidates:",
  n_distinct(
    outcome_long_all$WL_ID_CODE
  ),
  "\n"
)

cat(
  "Rows:",
  nrow(outcome_long_all),
  "\n"
)

cat(
  "Events by 90 days:",
  sum(outcome_long_all$event),
  "\n"
)

cat(
  "Controls observed beyond 90 days:",
  sum(
    outcome_long_all$event == 0 &
      outcome_long_all$time_days >
      CONFIG_PED$T_HORIZON
  ),
  "\n"
)

cat(
  "Censored before or at 90 days:",
  sum(
    outcome_long_all$event == 0 &
      outcome_long_all$time_days <=
      CONFIG_PED$T_HORIZON
  ),
  "\n"
)


# ── Step 13: Survival-analysis helpers ────────────────────────────
km_at_horizon <- function(
    dt_pos,
    t_horizon
) {
  
  if (nrow(dt_pos) == 0) {
    return(NULL)
  }
  
  fit <- tryCatch(
    survfit(
      Surv(time_days, event) ~ 1,
      data = dt_pos,
      conf.type = "log-log"
    ),
    error = function(e) NULL
  )
  
  if (is.null(fit)) {
    return(NULL)
  }
  
  smry <- tryCatch(
    summary(
      fit,
      times = t_horizon,
      extend = TRUE
    ),
    error = function(e) NULL
  )
  
  if (
    is.null(smry) ||
    length(smry$surv) == 0
  ) {
    return(NULL)
  }
  
  list(
    mortality = 1 - smry$surv[1],
    n_candidates = nrow(dt_pos)
  )
}


deduplicate_candidate_position <- function(
    dt,
    seed,
    cluster_variable = "WL_ID_CODE"
) {
  
  set.seed(seed)
  
  dt <- as.data.table(
    copy(dt)
  )
  
  group_variables <- c(
    cluster_variable,
    "System",
    "sequence"
  )
  
  dt[
    ,
    .SD[sample.int(.N, 1L)],
    by = group_variables
  ]
}


estimate_km_curve <- function(
    dt,
    p_max,
    n_min,
    t_horizon
) {
  
  dt <- as.data.table(dt)
  
  results <- data.table(
    position = seq_len(p_max),
    mortality = NA_real_,
    n_candidates = NA_integer_
  )
  
  for (p in seq_len(p_max)) {
    
    sub <- as.data.frame(
      dt[sequence == p]
    )
    
    if (nrow(sub) < n_min) {
      next
    }
    
    res <- km_at_horizon(
      sub,
      t_horizon
    )
    
    if (is.null(res)) {
      next
    }
    
    results[
      p,
      `:=`(
        mortality = res$mortality,
        n_candidates = res$n_candidates
      )
    ]
  }
  
  results
}


estimate_both_systems <- function(
    dt,
    p_max,
    n_min,
    t_horizon,
    seed,
    cluster_variable = "WL_ID_CODE"
) {
  
  dedup <- deduplicate_candidate_position(
    dt = dt,
    seed = seed,
    cluster_variable = cluster_variable
  )
  
  bind_rows(
    estimate_km_curve(
      dedup[
        System == "Current System"
      ],
      p_max = p_max,
      n_min = n_min,
      t_horizon = t_horizon
    ) %>%
      as_tibble() %>%
      mutate(
        System = "Current System"
      ),
    
    estimate_km_curve(
      dedup[
        System ==
          "4-Status Counterfactual"
      ],
      p_max = p_max,
      n_min = n_min,
      t_horizon = t_horizon
    ) %>%
      as_tibble() %>%
      mutate(
        System =
          "4-Status Counterfactual"
      )
  )
}


calculate_curve_slope <- function(
    curve_data,
    p_max = 20
) {
  
  dat <- curve_data %>%
    filter(
      position <= p_max,
      !is.na(mortality)
    )
  
  if (nrow(dat) < 3) {
    return(NA_real_)
  }
  
  unname(
    coef(
      lm(
        mortality ~ position,
        data = dat
      )
    )[["position"]]
  )
}


format_boot_p <- function(p) {
  
  case_when(
    is.na(p) ~ NA_character_,
    p < 0.001 ~ "<0.001",
    TRUE ~ sprintf("%.3f", p)
  )
}


# ── Step 14: Point estimates across multiple deduplication draws ──
cat(
  "\nRunning",
  CONFIG_PED$L_POINT,
  "deduplication draws for point estimates...\n"
)


point_draws <- lapply(
  seq_len(CONFIG_PED$L_POINT),
  function(draw_number) {
    
    estimate_both_systems(
      dt = outcome_long_all,
      p_max = CONFIG_PED$P_MAX,
      n_min = CONFIG_PED$N_MIN,
      t_horizon = CONFIG_PED$T_HORIZON,
      seed =
        CONFIG_PED$SEED +
        draw_number,
      cluster_variable = "WL_ID_CODE"
    ) %>%
      mutate(
        draw = draw_number
      )
  }
) %>%
  bind_rows()


point_curve <- point_draws %>%
  group_by(
    System,
    position
  ) %>%
  summarise(
    km_90 = mean(
      mortality,
      na.rm = TRUE
    ),
    
    n_candidates = round(
      mean(
        n_candidates,
        na.rm = TRUE
      )
    ),
    
    n_draws = sum(
      !is.na(mortality)
    ),
    
    .groups = "drop"
  ) %>%
  mutate(
    km_90 = if_else(
      is.nan(km_90),
      NA_real_,
      km_90
    )
  )


cat(
  "Completed point-estimate draws.\n"
)


# ── Step 15: Paired candidate-clustered bootstrap ─────────────────
# Each bootstrap sample draws candidates with replacement. Every
# sampled candidate contributes observations under both allocation
# systems, preserving the paired comparison.

outcome_dt <- as.data.table(
  outcome_long_all
)

setkey(
  outcome_dt,
  WL_ID_CODE
)

unique_ids <- unique(
  outcome_dt$WL_ID_CODE
)


bootstrap_results <- vector(
  "list",
  CONFIG_PED$N_BOOT
)

bootstrap_errors <- character(
  CONFIG_PED$N_BOOT
)


cat(
  "\nRunning paired candidate-clustered bootstrap (n =",
  CONFIG_PED$N_BOOT,
  ")...\n"
)


pb <- txtProgressBar(
  min = 0,
  max = CONFIG_PED$N_BOOT,
  style = 3
)


for (
  bootstrap_iteration in
  seq_len(CONFIG_PED$N_BOOT)
) {
  
  tryCatch({
    
    set.seed(
      CONFIG_PED$SEED +
        10000L +
        bootstrap_iteration
    )
    
    sampled_ids <- sample(
      unique_ids,
      size = length(unique_ids),
      replace = TRUE
    )
    
    bootstrap_id_table <- data.table(
      WL_ID_CODE = sampled_ids,
      
      # Duplicate draws of the same candidate are treated as distinct
      # bootstrap clusters.
      boot_cluster = seq_along(
        sampled_ids
      )
    )
    
    
    bootstrap_data <- outcome_dt[
      bootstrap_id_table,
      on = "WL_ID_CODE",
      allow.cartesian = TRUE
    ]
    
    
    bootstrap_curves <- estimate_both_systems(
      dt = bootstrap_data,
      p_max = CONFIG_PED$P_MAX,
      n_min = CONFIG_PED$N_MIN,
      t_horizon = CONFIG_PED$T_HORIZON,
      seed =
        CONFIG_PED$SEED +
        20000L +
        bootstrap_iteration,
      cluster_variable = "boot_cluster"
    )
    
    
    bootstrap_slopes <- bootstrap_curves %>%
      group_by(System) %>%
      summarise(
        trend_slope = calculate_curve_slope(
          pick(everything()),
          p_max = CONFIG_PED$TREND_P_MAX
        ),
        .groups = "drop"
      )
    
    
    bootstrap_results[[
      bootstrap_iteration
    ]] <- bootstrap_curves %>%
      left_join(
        bootstrap_slopes,
        by = "System"
      ) %>%
      mutate(
        iteration =
          bootstrap_iteration
      )
    
  }, error = function(e) {
    
    bootstrap_errors[
      bootstrap_iteration
    ] <<- conditionMessage(e)
    
  })
  
  setTxtProgressBar(
    pb,
    bootstrap_iteration
  )
}


close(pb)


bootstrap_long <- bind_rows(
  bootstrap_results
)


successful_iterations <- n_distinct(
  bootstrap_long$iteration
)


cat(
  "\nSuccessful bootstrap iterations:",
  successful_iterations,
  "/",
  CONFIG_PED$N_BOOT,
  "\n"
)


if (
  successful_iterations <
  0.95 * CONFIG_PED$N_BOOT
) {
  warning(
    paste0(
      "Fewer than 95% of bootstrap iterations succeeded: ",
      successful_iterations,
      " of ",
      CONFIG_PED$N_BOOT,
      "."
    )
  )
}


if (any(nzchar(bootstrap_errors))) {
  
  cat("\nBootstrap failure reasons:\n")
  
  print(
    sort(
      table(
        bootstrap_errors[
          nzchar(bootstrap_errors)
        ]
      ),
      decreasing = TRUE
    )
  )
}


# ── Step 16: Bootstrap CIs for each system ────────────────────────
alpha <- 1 -
  CONFIG_PED$CONF_LEVEL


curve_boot_summary <- bootstrap_long %>%
  filter(
    !is.na(mortality)
  ) %>%
  group_by(
    System,
    position
  ) %>%
  summarise(
    km_90_lower = quantile(
      mortality,
      alpha / 2,
      na.rm = TRUE
    ),
    
    km_90_upper = quantile(
      mortality,
      1 - alpha / 2,
      na.rm = TRUE
    ),
    
    n_boot_position = n(),
    
    .groups = "drop"
  )


obs_km_seq_all <- point_curve %>%
  left_join(
    curve_boot_summary,
    by = c(
      "System",
      "position"
    )
  ) %>%
  transmute(
    System = factor(
      System,
      levels = c(
        "Current System",
        "4-Status Counterfactual"
      )
    ),
    
    sequence = position,
    km_90,
    km_90_lower,
    km_90_upper,
    n_candidates,
    n_draws,
    n_boot_position
  )


cat("\nKey position-specific estimates:\n")

obs_km_seq_all %>%
  filter(
    sequence %in%
      c(1, 2, 3, 5, 10, 20, 50)
  ) %>%
  mutate(
    across(
      c(
        km_90,
        km_90_lower,
        km_90_upper
      ),
      ~ round(.x * 100, 1)
    )
  ) %>%
  print()


# ── Step 17: Paired pointwise differences ─────────────────────────
bootstrap_wide <- bootstrap_long %>%
  dplyr::select(
    iteration,
    System,
    position,
    mortality
  ) %>%
  pivot_wider(
    names_from = System,
    values_from = mortality
  ) %>%
  mutate(
    diff =
      `4-Status Counterfactual` -
      `Current System`
  )


point_diff <- point_curve %>%
  dplyr::select(
    System,
    position,
    km_90
  ) %>%
  pivot_wider(
    names_from = System,
    values_from = km_90
  ) %>%
  mutate(
    diff =
      `4-Status Counterfactual` -
      `Current System`
  )


curve_diff <- bootstrap_wide %>%
  filter(
    position <=
      CONFIG_PED$TREND_P_MAX,
    !is.na(diff)
  ) %>%
  group_by(position) %>%
  summarise(
    lower_diff = quantile(
      diff,
      alpha / 2,
      na.rm = TRUE
    ),
    
    upper_diff = quantile(
      diff,
      1 - alpha / 2,
      na.rm = TRUE
    ),
    
    # Finite-sample corrected, two-sided paired bootstrap p-value.
    p_lower = (
      1 + sum(
        diff <= 0,
        na.rm = TRUE
      )
    ) / (
      1 + sum(
        !is.na(diff)
      )
    ),
    
    p_upper = (
      1 + sum(
        diff >= 0,
        na.rm = TRUE
      )
    ) / (
      1 + sum(
        !is.na(diff)
      )
    ),
    
    p_value = pmin(
      1,
      2 * pmin(
        p_lower,
        p_upper
      )
    ),
    
    n_boot = sum(
      !is.na(diff)
    ),
    
    .groups = "drop"
  ) %>%
  left_join(
    point_diff %>%
      dplyr::select(
        position,
        diff
      ),
    by = "position"
  ) %>%
  mutate(
    diff_pct =
      round(diff * 100, 1),
    
    lower_diff_pct =
      round(
        lower_diff * 100,
        1
      ),
    
    upper_diff_pct =
      round(
        upper_diff * 100,
        1
      ),
    
    p_fmt =
      format_boot_p(p_value)
  )


cat(
  "\nPaired difference in 90-day mortality ",
  "(counterfactual minus current):\n",
  sep = ""
)

curve_diff %>%
  dplyr::select(
    position,
    diff_pct,
    lower_diff_pct,
    upper_diff_pct,
    p_fmt,
    n_boot
  ) %>%
  print(
    n = CONFIG_PED$TREND_P_MAX
  )


# ── Step 18: Bootstrap mortality-gradient test ────────────────────
# The test evaluates whether mortality decreases as numerical sequence
# position increases from 1 through 20.
#
# A negative slope indicates higher mortality nearer the top of the
# match run and progressively lower mortality at later positions.

point_slopes <- point_draws %>%
  filter(
    position <=
      CONFIG_PED$TREND_P_MAX
  ) %>%
  group_by(
    draw,
    System
  ) %>%
  summarise(
    trend_slope = calculate_curve_slope(
      pick(everything()),
      p_max = CONFIG_PED$TREND_P_MAX
    ),
    .groups = "drop"
  ) %>%
  group_by(System) %>%
  summarise(
    trend_slope =
      mean(
        trend_slope,
        na.rm = TRUE
      ),
    .groups = "drop"
  )


bootstrap_slopes <- bootstrap_long %>%
  dplyr::select(
    iteration,
    System,
    trend_slope
  ) %>%
  distinct() %>%
  filter(
    !is.na(trend_slope)
  )


trend_results <- bootstrap_slopes %>%
  group_by(System) %>%
  summarise(
    slope_lower = quantile(
      trend_slope,
      alpha / 2,
      na.rm = TRUE
    ),
    
    slope_upper = quantile(
      trend_slope,
      1 - alpha / 2,
      na.rm = TRUE
    ),
    
    # One-sided bootstrap p-value for:
    # H0: slope >= 0
    # HA: slope < 0
    p_value = (
      1 + sum(
        trend_slope >= 0,
        na.rm = TRUE
      )
    ) / (
      1 + sum(
        !is.na(trend_slope)
      )
    ),
    
    n_boot = n(),
    
    .groups = "drop"
  ) %>%
  left_join(
    point_slopes,
    by = "System"
  ) %>%
  mutate(
    p_fmt =
      format_boot_p(p_value)
  )


cat(
  "\n=== BOOTSTRAP MORTALITY-GRADIENT TEST ===\n"
)

cat(
  "Alternative hypothesis: mortality decreases as sequence position increases.\n"
)

trend_results %>%
  print()



  # ── Paired bootstrap test: is the counterfactual slope steeper? ───
  # H0: beta_CF - beta_Current >= 0
  # HA: beta_CF - beta_Current < 0
  
  slope_diff_boot <- bootstrap_slopes %>%
  dplyr::select(
    iteration,
    System,
    trend_slope
  ) %>%
  pivot_wider(
    names_from  = System,
    values_from = trend_slope
  ) %>%
  filter(
    !is.na(`Current System`),
    !is.na(`4-Status Counterfactual`)
  ) %>%
  mutate(
    slope_diff =
      `4-Status Counterfactual` -
      `Current System`
  )


# Observed slope difference from the point estimates
observed_slope_diff <- point_slopes %>%
  dplyr::select(
    System,
    trend_slope
  ) %>%
  pivot_wider(
    names_from  = System,
    values_from = trend_slope
  ) %>%
  transmute(
    slope_diff =
      `4-Status Counterfactual` -
      `Current System`
  ) %>%
  pull(slope_diff)


# Paired bootstrap confidence interval and one-sided p-value
slope_diff_results <- slope_diff_boot %>%
  summarise(
    observed_slope_diff = observed_slope_diff,
    
    lower_95 = quantile(
      slope_diff,
      0.025,
      na.rm = TRUE
    ),
    
    upper_95 = quantile(
      slope_diff,
      0.975,
      na.rm = TRUE
    ),
    
    # One-sided paired bootstrap test:
    # count how often the counterfactual is not steeper
    p_value = (
      1 + sum(
        slope_diff >= 0,
        na.rm = TRUE
      )
    ) / (
      1 + sum(
        !is.na(slope_diff)
      )
    ),
    
    n_boot = sum(
      !is.na(slope_diff)
    )
  ) %>%
  mutate(
    # Convert slope difference to percentage points per position
    slope_diff_pp_per_position =
      observed_slope_diff * 100,
    
    lower_95_pp_per_position =
      lower_95 * 100,
    
    upper_95_pp_per_position =
      upper_95 * 100,
    
    # Additional fitted mortality separation across positions 1–20
    additional_decline_1_to_20 =
      -observed_slope_diff *
      (CONFIG_PED$TREND_P_MAX - 1),
    
    additional_decline_1_to_20_pct =
      additional_decline_1_to_20 * 100,
    
    p_fmt = case_when(
      p_value < 0.001 ~ "<0.001",
      TRUE            ~ sprintf("%.3f", p_value)
    )
  )


cat(
  "\n=== PAIRED BOOTSTRAP COMPARISON OF MORTALITY GRADIENTS ===\n"
)

cat(
  "Alternative hypothesis: the counterfactual slope is more negative.\n"
)

slope_diff_results %>%
  print()



cat(
  "\nObserved slope difference (CF - Current):",
  round(
    slope_diff_results$slope_diff_pp_per_position,
    3
  ),
  "percentage points per position\n"
)

cat(
  "95% bootstrap CI:",
  round(
    slope_diff_results$lower_95_pp_per_position,
    3
  ),
  "to",
  round(
    slope_diff_results$upper_95_pp_per_position,
    3
  ),
  "percentage points per position\n"
)

cat(
  "One-sided paired bootstrap p-value:",
  slope_diff_results$p_fmt,
  "\n"
)

cat(
  "Additional fitted decline from positions 1 to",
  CONFIG_PED$TREND_P_MAX,
  ":",
  round(
    slope_diff_results$additional_decline_1_to_20_pct,
    2
  ),
  "percentage points\n"
)

# ── Step 19: Median acceptance position ───────────────────────────
median_accept_all <- ptr_all_ped %>%
  filter(
    OFFER_ACCEPT == "Y"
  ) %>%
  summarise(
    median_position = median(
      PTR_SEQUENCE_NUM,
      na.rm = TRUE
    )
  ) %>%
  pull(median_position)


cat("\nAccepted-offer sequence positions:\n")

ptr_all_ped %>%
  filter(
    OFFER_ACCEPT == "Y"
  ) %>%
  summarise(
    median = median(
      PTR_SEQUENCE_NUM,
      na.rm = TRUE
    ),
    
    q25 = quantile(
      PTR_SEQUENCE_NUM,
      0.25,
      na.rm = TRUE
    ),
    
    q75 = quantile(
      PTR_SEQUENCE_NUM,
      0.75,
      na.rm = TRUE
    )
  ) %>%
  print()


# ── Step 20: Summary table ────────────────────────────────────────
cat("\nMortality at key sequence positions:\n")

obs_km_seq_all %>%
  filter(
    sequence %in%
      c(1, 2, 3, 5, 10, 20)
  ) %>%
  mutate(
    across(
      c(
        km_90,
        km_90_lower,
        km_90_upper
      ),
      ~ round(.x * 100, 1)
    )
  ) %>%
  dplyr::select(
    System,
    sequence,
    km_90,
    km_90_lower,
    km_90_upper
  ) %>%
  arrange(
    System,
    sequence
  ) %>%
  print()


# ── Step 21: Significance markers ─────────────────────────────────
sig_positions <- curve_diff %>%
  filter(
    p_value < 0.05
  ) %>%
  left_join(
    obs_km_seq_all %>%
      filter(
        System ==
          "4-Status Counterfactual"
      ) %>%
      dplyr::select(
        sequence,
        km_90_upper
      ),
    by = c(
      "position" = "sequence"
    )
  ) %>%
  mutate(
    y_star =
      km_90_upper +
      0.005
  )


# ── Step 22: Plot ─────────────────────────────────────────────────
fig_km_position <- ggplot(
  obs_km_seq_all,
  aes(
    x = sequence,
    y = km_90,
    color = System,
    fill = System
  )
) +
  geom_ribbon(
    aes(
      ymin = km_90_lower,
      ymax = km_90_upper
    ),
    alpha = 0.15,
    color = NA
  ) +
  geom_point(
    size = 1.5,
    alpha = 0.8
  ) +
  geom_line(
    linewidth = 0.8
  ) +
  geom_vline(
    aes(
      xintercept =
        median_accept_all,
      linetype =
        "Median Acceptance Position"
    ),
    color = "black",
    linewidth = 0.8
  ) +
  geom_text(
    data = sig_positions,
    aes(
      x = position,
      y = y_star
    ),
    label = "*",
    size = 7,
    color = "black",
    fontface = "bold",
    inherit.aes = FALSE
  ) +
  scale_color_manual(
    values = c(
      "Current System" = "#374e55",
      "4-Status Counterfactual" = "#b24745"
    )
  ) +
  scale_fill_manual(
    values = c(
      "Current System" = "#374e55",
      "4-Status Counterfactual" = "#b24745"
    )
  ) +
  scale_linetype_manual(
    values = c(
      "Median Acceptance Position" =
        "dashed"
    ),
    name = NULL
  ) +
  scale_y_continuous(
    labels =
      scales::percent_format(
        accuracy = 0.1
      )
  ) +
  scale_x_continuous(
    breaks = seq(
      1,
      CONFIG_PED$TREND_P_MAX,
      1
    )
  ) +
  coord_cartesian(
    xlim = c(
      1,
      CONFIG_PED$TREND_P_MAX
    )
  ) +
  guides(
    color =
      guide_legend(
        nrow = 1,
        order = 1
      ),
    
    fill =
      guide_legend(
        nrow = 1,
        order = 1
      ),
    
    linetype =
      guide_legend(
        nrow = 1,
        order = 2
      )
  ) +
  labs(
    x =
      "Match Run Sequence Position",
    
    y =
      "90-Day Rate of Death or Deterioration",
    
    color =
      "Allocation System",
    
    fill =
      "Allocation System"
  ) +
  theme_classic(
    base_size = 16
  ) +
  theme(
    axis.text =
      element_text(
        size = 15
      ),
    
    axis.title =
      element_text(
        size = 15
      ),
    
    legend.text =
      element_text(
        size = 15
      ),
    
    legend.title =
      element_text(
        face = "bold",
        size = 15
      ),
    
    legend.position =
      "bottom",
    
    legend.box =
      "vertical",
    
    panel.grid.major.y =
      element_line(
        color = "gray90",
        linewidth = 0.3
      )
  )


print(fig_km_position)


# ── Step 23: GT results table ─────────────────────────────────────
library(gt)


results_table <- obs_km_seq_all %>%
  filter(
    sequence <=
      CONFIG_PED$TREND_P_MAX
  ) %>%
  mutate(
    est_ci = sprintf(
      "%.1f%% (%.1f–%.1f%%)",
      km_90 * 100,
      km_90_lower * 100,
      km_90_upper * 100
    )
  ) %>%
  dplyr::select(
    System,
    sequence,
    est_ci
  ) %>%
  pivot_wider(
    names_from = System,
    values_from = est_ci
  ) %>%
  left_join(
    curve_diff %>%
      dplyr::select(
        position,
        p_fmt
      ),
    by = c(
      "sequence" = "position"
    )
  ) %>%
  gt() %>%
  cols_label(
    sequence =
      "Sequence",
    
    `Current System` =
      "Current System",
    
    `4-Status Counterfactual` =
      "4-Status Counterfactual",
    
    p_fmt =
      "P Value"
  ) %>%
  tab_header(
    title =
      "90-Day Mortality by Match Run Sequence Position",
    
    subtitle =
      "Current and 4-status counterfactual allocation systems, 2019–2024"
  ) %>%
  tab_footnote(
    footnote =
      "Confidence intervals and P values were estimated using paired candidate-clustered bootstrap resampling.",
    
    locations =
      cells_column_labels(
        columns = p_fmt
      )
  )


results_table


```
